---


项目已在浏览器中打开，当前状态如下：

**服务运行状态：**

1. **后端服务**：已启动，地址为 `http://localhost:3000`
   - WebSocket：`ws://localhost:3000/ws`
   - NPC 自主移动已开启
   - ⚠️ 日志显示 Redis 连接失败（`ECONNREFUSED`），如需 Redis 功能请确保 Redis 已启动

2. **前端服务**：已启动，地址为 `http://localhost:5173`
   - 页面标题为「AI 配置管理」，已成功在浏览器中打开

**前端依赖问题：**
- 项目缺少 `vue3-toastify` 依赖，可能导致部分功能或样式异常。如需修复，可在 `frontend` 目录执行：
  - `npm install vue3-toastify`

\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_98ca2f19-7a7a-43f1-8410-b291098813e\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_98ca2f19-7a7a-43f1-8410-b291098813e\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# AI 配置模块\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n管理多平台 AI 模型配置的前后端应用，支持 OpenAI、Claude、通义千问、文心一言、智谱等。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 技术栈\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **前端**: Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript，地图渲染 Phaser\\\\\\\\n- **后端**: Node.js + Express\\\\\\\\n- **数据库**: MySQL + Redis（地图/NPC 实时状态）\\\\\\\\n- **实时推送**: WebSocket（需鉴权，多用户隔离）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 快速开始\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. 数据库与 Redis\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncd backend\\\\\\\\ncp .env.example .env\\\\\\\\n# 编辑 .env 填写 MySQL、Redis 连接信息\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:init\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:migrate-npc          # 创建 npc 表\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:migrate-conversation # 创建对话相关表\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:migrate-memory       # 创建记忆表 npc_memory\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:migrate-memory-embedding  # 添加 embedding 列\\\\\\\\nnpm run db:migrate-map          # 创建 game_map、npc_map_binding 等表\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n需先启动 Redis（如 &#96;redis-server&#96; 或 Docker）。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. 启动后端\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncd backend\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev\\\\\\\\n# 服务运行在 http://localhost:3000\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. 启动前端\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncd frontend\\\\\\\\ncp .env.example .env\\\\\\\\n# 如需修改 API 地址，编辑 VITE_API_BASE\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\nnpm run dev\\\\\\\\n# 访问 http://localhost:5173\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 项目结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nAINPC/\\\\\\\\n├── frontend/          # Vue3 + Vite + TS\\\\\\\\n│   ├── src/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── api/       # API 接口\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── components/ # 配置列表、表单组件\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── types/     # 类型定义\\\\\\\\n│   └── ...\\\\\\\\n├── backend/           # Node.js + Express\\\\\\\\n│   ├── src/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── controllers/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── db/        # 数据库连接、初始化、表结构\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── routes/\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── types/\\\\\\\\n│   └── ...\\\\\\\\n└── 需求.md\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## API 接口\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|-----|------|-----|\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/config | 获取配置列表（支持 provider、status 筛选） |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/config/:id | 获取单个配置 |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/config | 新增配置 |\\\\\\\\n| PUT | /api/config/:id | 更新配置 |\\\\\\\\n| DELETE | /api/config/:id | 删除配置 |\\\\\\\\n| PATCH | /api/config/:id/default | 设为默认配置 |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/conversation/chat | 用户与 NPC 对话（Body: npc_id, session_id?, user_input） |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/conversation/chat/stream | 流式对话（SSE 逐字返回） |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/conversation/conversations | 会话列表（Query: npc_id） |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/conversation/conversations | 创建会话（Body: npc_id） |\\\\\\\\n| DELETE | /api/conversation/conversations/:id | 删除会话 |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/conversation/messages | 获取会话历史（Query: session_id） |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/memory | 记忆列表（Query: npc_id） |\\\\\\\\n| DELETE | /api/memory/:id | 删除记忆 |\\\\\\\\n| PATCH | /api/memory/:id | 更新记忆 |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/memory/reflect | 手动触发反思（Query: npc_id） |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/upload/avatar | 上传头像（multipart/form-data, field: file） |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/map | 地图列表 |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/map/:id | 地图详情 |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/map | 创建地图 |\\\\\\\\n| PUT | /api/map/:id | 更新地图 |\\\\\\\\n| DELETE | /api/map/:id | 删除地图 |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/map/:mapId/bindings | 地图绑定的 NPC |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/map/:mapId/bindings | 添加 NPC 到地图 |\\\\\\\\n| DELETE | /api/map/:mapId/bindings/:npcId | 移除绑定 |\\\\\\\\n| POST | /api/map/:mapId/init | 初始化场景（写入 Redis） |\\\\\\\\n| GET | /api/map/:mapId/state | 场景实时状态 |\\\\\\\\n| WebSocket | ws://host/ws?token=xxx&amp;mapId=1 | 地图状态推送 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 配置字段说明\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **name**: 配置名称\\\\\\\\n- **provider**: 提供商（OpenAI、Claude 等）\\\\\\\\n- **api_key**: API Key（新增必填，列表/详情不返回）\\\\\\\\n- **base_url**: 自定义 API 地址（可选）\\\\\\\\n- **model**: 模型名称\\\\\\\\n- **temperature**: 温度 0-2\\\\\\\\n- **max_tokens**: 最大生成 token 数\\\\\\\\n- **is_default**: 是否默认\\\\\\\\n- **status**: 0 禁用 / 1 启用\\\\\\\\n- **remark**: 备注\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":115}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# AI 配置表（已存在则跳过，不删除数据）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_config (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '配置名称',\\\\\\\\n  provider VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '提供商: OpenAI, Claude, 通义千问, 文心一言 等',\\\\\\\\n  api_key VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'API Key（建议加密存储）',\\\\\\\\n  base_url VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'API 基础地址，为空则使用官方默认',\\\\\\\\n  model VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT 'gpt-3.5-turbo' COMMENT '模型名称',\\\\\\\\n  temperature DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.7 COMMENT '温度参数 0-2',\\\\\\\\n  max_tokens INT DEFAULT 2000 COMMENT '最大生成 token 数',\\\\\\\\n  is_default TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否默认配置 0否 1是',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态 0禁用 1启用',\\\\\\\\n  remark VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注说明',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_provider (provider),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_is_default (is_default)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='AI配置表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 角色 NPC 表（已存在则跳过，不删除数据）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '角色名称',\\\\\\\\n  description VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色简介',\\\\\\\\n  background TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色背景（详细背景故事、出身、经历等）',\\\\\\\\n  personality VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色性格（性格特质、待人方式等）',\\\\\\\\n  gender VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '性别: male/female/other/unknown',\\\\\\\\n  age VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '年龄: 数字或描述如青年',\\\\\\\\n  occupation VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '职业',\\\\\\\\n  voice_tone VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '说话风格/语气',\\\\\\\\n  avatar VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像 URL',\\\\\\\\n  ai_config_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 ai_config，指定使用的 AI 模型',\\\\\\\\n  system_prompt TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '系统提示词（角色人设、口吻、行为约束）',\\\\\\\\n  category VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：task/plot/custom',\\\\\\\\n  prompt_type VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT 'high' COMMENT '约束类型：high/low',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态 0禁用 1启用',\\\\\\\\n  sort INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '排序',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_ai_config_id (ai_config_id),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_category (category),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (ai_config_id) REFERENCES ai_config(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='角色NPC表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 对话会话表（用户与 NPC 的对话会话）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_conversation (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  user_id VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '可选：用户标识',\\\\\\\\n  session_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '会话唯一标识',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_id (npc_id),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_session_id (session_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC对话会话表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 对话消息表（每轮对话的消息）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_message (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_conversation',\\\\\\\\n  role ENUM('user','assistant') NOT NULL COMMENT 'user=用户 assistant=NPC',\\\\\\\\n  content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='对话消息表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 记忆表（对话总结、反思、关系等，用于注入下一轮对话）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_memory (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_conversation（可选）',\\\\\\\\n  type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'conversation/reflection/relationship',\\\\\\\\n  description TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '记忆内容',\\\\\\\\n  importance DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.5 COMMENT '重要度 0-1，用于筛选',\\\\\\\\n  related_ids JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联记忆 id 列表；type=relationship 时可为 {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"target_npc_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":2}',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_type (npc_id, type),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_importance (npc_id, importance DESC),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC记忆表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- ========== 地图与交互模块（详见 交互.md） ==========\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 游戏地图表\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_map (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '地图名称',\\\\\\\\n  width INT NOT NULL COMMENT '地图宽度（格子数）',\\\\\\\\n  height INT NOT NULL COMMENT '地图高度（格子数）',\\\\\\\\n  tile_data JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '2D 数组，0=可行走 1=障碍',\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '扩展：图块类型、图层等',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='游戏地图表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 物品表（建筑、喷泉、家具等，footprint 推导 tile_data）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  category VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'object',\\\\\\\\n  description VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  footprint JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '2D数组 [[1,1],[1,0]] 1=障碍0=可行走',\\\\\\\\n  tile_value TINYINT DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  is_blocking TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  sort INT DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_category (category)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='物品表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 物品与地图关联（放置位置，据此推导 tile_data）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_map_binding (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  item_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  pos_x INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  pos_y INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  rotation TINYINT DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  extra JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_map (map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='物品与地图关联';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC与地图上物品的关联（nearby 由 wander 自动维护）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_map_item (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  item_binding_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  relation_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'nearby',\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_map (npc_id, map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (item_binding_id) REFERENCES item_map_binding(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC与地图上物品的关联';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 与地图绑定及初始位置（Redis 冷启动时从此加载）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_map_binding (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 game_map',\\\\\\\\n  init_x INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '初始 X 坐标',\\\\\\\\n  init_y INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '初始 Y 坐标',\\\\\\\\n  UNIQUE KEY uk_npc_map (npc_id, map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC与地图绑定及初始位置';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 之间对话会话表（持久化，进行中在 Redis）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_npc_conversation (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '发生在地图上的对话',\\\\\\\\n  participant_ids JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '参与 NPC id 列表，如 [1,2,3]',\\\\\\\\n  status ENUM('active','ended') DEFAULT 'ended',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  ended_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_map (map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC之间对话会话表（持久化）';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 之间对话消息表（持久化）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_npc_message (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_npc_conversation',\\\\\\\\n  speaker_npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '发言的 NPC',\\\\\\\\n  content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (speaker_npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC之间对话消息表（持久化）';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- AI 接口调用日志表\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_call_log (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  ai_config_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联 ai_config（可选）',\\\\\\\\n  api_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'chat/chat_stream/embed',\\\\\\\\n  provider VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '提供商',\\\\\\\\n  model VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型名',\\\\\\\\n  request_info JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '请求信息',\\\\\\\\n  response_info JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '响应信息',\\\\\\\\n  request_content TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '请求内容（输入）',\\\\\\\\n  response_content TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '响应内容（输出）',\\\\\\\\n  duration_ms INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '耗时(毫秒)',\\\\\\\\n  status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success' COMMENT 'success/error',\\\\\\\\n  error_message TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '错误信息',\\\\\\\\n  source VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '调用来源',\\\\\\\\n  context JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '扩展上下文',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_created (created_at),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_api_type (api_type),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),       \\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_ai_config (ai_config_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (ai_config_id) REFERENCES ai_config(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='AI接口调用日志表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":211}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\schema.sql\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"-- AI 配置表（已存在则跳过，不删除数据）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_config (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '配置名称',\\\\\\\\n  provider VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '提供商: OpenAI, Claude, 通义千问, 文心一言 等',\\\\\\\\n  api_key VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'API Key（建议加密存储）',\\\\\\\\n  base_url VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'API 基础地址，为空则使用官方默认',\\\\\\\\n  model VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT 'gpt-3.5-turbo' COMMENT '模型名称',\\\\\\\\n  temperature DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.7 COMMENT '温度参数 0-2',\\\\\\\\n  max_tokens INT DEFAULT 2000 COMMENT '最大生成 token 数',\\\\\\\\n  is_default TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否默认配置 0否 1是',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态 0禁用 1启用',\\\\\\\\n  remark VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '备注说明',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_provider (provider),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_is_default (is_default)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='AI配置表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 角色 NPC 表（已存在则跳过，不删除数据）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '角色名称',\\\\\\\\n  description VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色简介',\\\\\\\\n  background TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色背景（详细背景故事、出身、经历等）',\\\\\\\\n  personality VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色性格（性格特质、待人方式等）',\\\\\\\\n  gender VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '性别: male/female/other/unknown',\\\\\\\\n  age VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '年龄: 数字或描述如青年',\\\\\\\\n  occupation VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '职业',\\\\\\\\n  voice_tone VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '说话风格/语气',\\\\\\\\n  avatar VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像 URL',\\\\\\\\n  ai_config_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 ai_config，指定使用的 AI 模型',\\\\\\\\n  system_prompt TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '系统提示词（角色人设、口吻、行为约束）',\\\\\\\\n  category VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'custom' COMMENT '分类：task/plot/custom',\\\\\\\\n  prompt_type VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT 'high' COMMENT '约束类型：high/low',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态 0禁用 1启用',\\\\\\\\n  sort INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '排序',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_ai_config_id (ai_config_id),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_category (category),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (ai_config_id) REFERENCES ai_config(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='角色NPC表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 对话会话表（用户与 NPC 的对话会话）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_conversation (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  user_id VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '可选：用户标识',\\\\\\\\n  session_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '会话唯一标识',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_id (npc_id),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_session_id (session_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC对话会话表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 对话消息表（每轮对话的消息）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_message (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_conversation',\\\\\\\\n  role ENUM('user','assistant') NOT NULL COMMENT 'user=用户 assistant=NPC',\\\\\\\\n  content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='对话消息表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 记忆表（对话总结、反思、关系等，用于注入下一轮对话）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_memory (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_conversation（可选）',\\\\\\\\n  type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'conversation/reflection/relationship',\\\\\\\\n  description TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '记忆内容',\\\\\\\\n  importance DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.5 COMMENT '重要度 0-1，用于筛选',\\\\\\\\n  related_ids JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联记忆 id 列表；type=relationship 时可为 {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"target_npc_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":2}',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_type (npc_id, type),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_importance (npc_id, importance DESC),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC记忆表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- ========== 地图与交互模块（详见 交互.md） ==========\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 游戏地图表\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS game_map (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '地图名称',\\\\\\\\n  width INT NOT NULL COMMENT '地图宽度（格子数）',\\\\\\\\n  height INT NOT NULL COMMENT '地图高度（格子数）',\\\\\\\\n  tile_data JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '2D 数组，0=可行走 1=障碍',\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '扩展：图块类型、图层等',\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='游戏地图表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 物品表（建筑、喷泉、家具等，footprint 推导 tile_data）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  category VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'object',\\\\\\\\n  description VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  footprint JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '2D数组 [[1,1],[1,0]] 1=障碍0=可行走',\\\\\\\\n  tile_value TINYINT DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  is_blocking TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,\\\\\\\\n  sort INT DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_category (category)\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='物品表';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- 物品与地图关联（放置位置，据此推导 tile_data）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_map_binding (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  item_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  pos_x INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  pos_y INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  rotation TINYINT DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\n  extra JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_map (map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES item(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='物品与地图关联';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC与地图上物品的关联（nearby 由 wander 自动维护）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_map_item (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  item_binding_id BIGINT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  relation_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'nearby',\\\\\\\\n  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_npc_map (npc_id, map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (item_binding_id) REFERENCES item_map_binding(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC与地图上物品的关联';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 与地图绑定及初始位置（Redis 冷启动时从此加载）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_map_binding (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc',\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 game_map',\\\\\\\\n  init_x INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '初始 X 坐标',\\\\\\\\n  init_y INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '初始 Y 坐标',\\\\\\\\n  UNIQUE KEY uk_npc_map (npc_id, map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC与地图绑定及初始位置';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 之间对话会话表（持久化，进行中在 Redis）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_npc_conversation (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  map_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '发生在地图上的对话',\\\\\\\\n  participant_ids JSON NOT NULL COMMENT '参与 NPC id 列表，如 [1,2,3]',\\\\\\\\n  status ENUM('active','ended') DEFAULT 'ended',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  ended_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_map (map_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (map_id) REFERENCES game_map(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC之间对话会话表（持久化）';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- NPC 之间对话消息表（持久化）\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS npc_npc_message (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  conversation_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联 npc_npc_conversation',\\\\\\\\n  speaker_npc_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '发言的 NPC',\\\\\\\\n  content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES npc_npc_conversation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (speaker_npc_id) REFERENCES npc(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='NPC之间对话消息表（持久化）';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- AI 接口调用日志表\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_call_log (\\\\\\\\n  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',\\\\\\\\n  ai_config_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联 ai_config（可选）',\\\\\\\\n  api_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'chat/chat_stream/embed',\\\\\\\\n  provider VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '提供商',\\\\\\\\n  model VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型名',\\\\\\\\n  request_info JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '请求信息',\\\\\\\\n  response_info JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '响应信息',\\\\\\\\n  request_content TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '请求内容（输入）',\\\\\\\\n  response_content TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '响应内容（输出）',\\\\\\\\n  duration_ms INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '耗时(毫秒)',\\\\\\\\n  status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success' COMMENT 'success/error',\\\\\\\\n  error_message TEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '错误信息',\\\\\\\\n  source VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '调用来源',\\\\\\\\n  context JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '扩展上下文',\\\\\\\\n  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_created (created_at),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_api_type (api_type),\\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_status (status),       \\\\\\\\n  INDEX idx_ai_config (ai_config_id),\\\\\\\\n  FOREIGN KEY (ai_config_id) REFERENCES ai_config(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\\\\\\\\n) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 lse,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-19T13:03:26.427Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_54f568f6-6762-4c5d-8664-ba5b1020dc7\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_54f568f6-6762-4c5d-8664-ba5b1020dc7\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\config.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\config.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\config.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * AI 配置控制器 - 处理配置的增删改查逻辑\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport type { CreateConfigDto } from '../types/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取配置列表，支持按提供商、状态筛选 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getConfigList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { provider, status } = req.query;\\\\\\\\n    let sql = 'SELECT id, name, provider, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_config WHERE 1=1';\\\\\\\\n    const params: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (provider) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND provider = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(provider as string);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined &amp;&amp; status !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND status = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(Number(status));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getConfigList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取配置列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 根据 ID 获取单个配置（不返回 api_key） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getConfigById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, name, provider, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?',\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getConfigById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 新增配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body: CreateConfigDto = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !provider) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '配置名称和提供商为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (is_default === 1) {\\\\\\\\n      await pool.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ai_config (name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        provider,\\\\\\\\n        api_key || null,\\\\\\\\n        base_url || null,\\\\\\\\n        model || 'gpt-3.5-turbo',\\\\\\\\n        temperature ?? 0.7,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens ?? 2000,\\\\\\\\n        is_default ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        remark || null,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const insertId = (result as { insertId: number }).insertId;\\\\\\\\n    res.status(201).json({ code: 0, data: { id: insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (name !== undefined) { updates.push('name = ?'); params.push(name); }\\\\\\\\n    if (provider !== undefined) { updates.push('provider = ?'); params.push(provider); }\\\\\\\\n    if (api_key !== undefined) { updates.push('api_key = ?'); params.push(api_key); }\\\\\\\\n    if (base_url !== undefined) { updates.push('base_url = ?'); params.push(base_url); }\\\\\\\\n    if (model !== undefined) { updates.push('model = ?'); params.push(model); }\\\\\\\\n    if (temperature !== undefined) { updates.push('temperature = ?'); params.push(temperature); }\\\\\\\\n    if (max_tokens !== undefined) { updates.push('max_tokens = ?'); params.push(max_tokens); }\\\\\\\\n    if (is_default !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('is_default = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(is_default);\\\\\\\\n      if (is_default === 1) {\\\\\\\\n        await pool.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0 WHERE id != ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined) { updates.push('status = ?'); params.push(status); }\\\\\\\\n    if (remark !== undefined) { updates.push('remark = ?'); params.push(remark); }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE ai_config SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 连接测试 - 验证 API Key 与配置是否可用 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function testConnection(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, name, provider, api_key, base_url, model FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?',\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const config = list[0] as { api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string };\\\\\\\\n    const { api_key, base_url, provider, model } = config;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!api_key || !api_key.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '该配置未设置 API Key' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const { PROVIDER_BASE_URLS } = await import('../utils/providerDefaults.js');\\\\\\\\n    const base = (base_url &amp;&amp; base_url.trim()) || PROVIDER_BASE_URLS[provider] || 'https://api.openai.com/v1';\\\\\\\\n    const url = base.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/$/, '') + '/chat/completions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const body = {\\\\\\\\n      model: model || 'gpt-3.5-turbo',\\\\\\\\n      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Hi' }],\\\\\\\\n      max_tokens: 5,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const controller = new AbortController();\\\\\\\\n    const timeout = setTimeout(() =&gt; controller.abort(), 15000);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const resp = await fetch(url, {\\\\\\\\n      method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n      headers: {\\\\\\\\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\\\\\\\\n        Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${api_key}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      body: JSON.stringify(body),\\\\\\\\n      signal: controller.signal,\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    clearTimeout(timeout);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (resp.ok) {\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: 0, message: '连接成功' });\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      const errText = await resp.text();\\\\\\\\n      let errMsg = &#96;HTTP ${resp.status}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const errJson = JSON.parse(errText);\\\\\\\\n        errMsg = errJson.error?.message || errJson.message || errText.slice(0, 200) || errMsg;\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        errMsg = errText.slice(0, 200) || errMsg;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: -1, message: &#96;连接失败: ${errMsg}&#96; });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '连接测试失败';\\\\\\\\n    const isAbort = msg.includes('abort') || msg.includes('timeout');\\\\\\\\n    res.json({\\\\\\\\n      code: -1,\\\\\\\\n      message: isAbort ? '连接超时，请检查网络或 Base URL' : &#96;连接失败: ${msg}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 设为默认配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setDefaultConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const conn = await pool.getConnection();\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await conn.beginTransaction();\\\\\\\\n      await conn.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0');\\\\\\\\n      const [result] = await conn.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n      const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n      await conn.commit();\\\\\\\\n      if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: 0, message: '已设为默认' });\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      conn.release();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('setDefaultConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '操作失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":238}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\config.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * AI 配置控制器 - 处理配置的增删改查逻辑\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport type { CreateConfigDto } from '../types/index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取配置列表，支持按提供商、状态筛选 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getConfigList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { provider, status } = req.query;\\\\\\\\n    let sql = 'SELECT id, name, provider, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_config WHERE 1=1';\\\\\\\\n    const params: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (provider) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND provider = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(provider as string);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined &amp;&amp; status !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND status = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(Number(status));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getConfigList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取配置列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 根据 ID 获取单个配置（不返回 api_key） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getConfigById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, name, provider, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?',\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getConfigById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 新增配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body: CreateConfigDto = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !provider) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '配置名称和提供商为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (is_default === 1) {\\\\\\\\n      await pool.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0');\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO ai_config (name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        provider,\\\\\\\\n        api_key || null,\\\\\\\\n        base_url || null,\\\\\\\\n        model || 'gpt-3.5-turbo',\\\\\\\\n        temperature ?? 0.7,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens ?? 2000,\\\\\\\\n        is_default ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        remark || null,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const insertId = (result as { insertId: number }).insertId;\\\\\\\\n    res.status(201).json({ code: 0, data: { id: insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, provider, api_key, base_url, model, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, status, remark } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (name !== undefined) { updates.push('name = ?'); params.push(name); }\\\\\\\\n    if (provider !== undefined) { updates.push('provider = ?'); params.push(provider); }\\\\\\\\n    if (api_key !== undefined) { updates.push('api_key = ?'); params.push(api_key); }\\\\\\\\n    if (base_url !== undefined) { updates.push('base_url = ?'); params.push(base_url); }\\\\\\\\n    if (model !== undefined) { updates.push('model = ?'); params.push(model); }\\\\\\\\n    if (temperature !== undefined) { updates.push('temperature = ?'); params.push(temperature); }\\\\\\\\n    if (max_tokens !== undefined) { updates.push('max_tokens = ?'); params.push(max_tokens); }\\\\\\\\n    if (is_default !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('is_default = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(is_default);\\\\\\\\n      if (is_default === 1) {\\\\\\\\n        await pool.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0 WHERE id != ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined) { updates.push('status = ?'); params.push(status); }\\\\\\\\n    if (remark !== undefined) { updates.push('remark = ?'); params.push(remark); }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE ai_config SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除配置失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 连接测试 - 验证 API Key 与配置是否可用 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function testConnection(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, name, provider, api_key, base_url, model FROM ai_config WHERE id = ?',\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const config = list[0] as { api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string };\\\\\\\\n    const { api_key, base_url, provider, model } = config;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!api_key || !api_key.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '该配置未设置 API Key' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const { PROVIDER_BASE_URLS } = await import('../utils/providerDefaults.js');\\\\\\\\n    const base = (base_url &amp;&amp; base_url.trim()) || PROVIDER_BASE_URLS[provider] || 'https://api.openai.com/v1';\\\\\\\\n    const url = base.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/$/, '') + '/chat/completions';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const body = {\\\\\\\\n      model: model || 'gpt-3.5-turbo',\\\\\\\\n      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Hi' }],\\\\\\\\n      max_tokens: 5,\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const controller = new AbortController();\\\\\\\\n    const timeout = setTimeout(() =&gt; controller.abort(), 15000);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const resp = await fetch(url, {\\\\\\\\n      method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n      headers: {\\\\\\\\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\\\\\\\\n        Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${api_key}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      body: JSON.stringify(body),\\\\\\\\n      signal: controller.signal,\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    clearTimeout(timeout);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (resp.ok) {\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: 0, message: '连接成功' });\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      const errText = await resp.text();\\\\\\\\n      let errMsg = &#96;HTTP ${resp.status}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const errJson = JSON.parse(errText);\\\\\\\\n        errMsg = errJson.error?.message || errJson.message || errText.slice(0, 200) || errMsg;\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        errMsg = errText.slice(0, 200) || errMsg;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: -1, message: &#96;连接失败: ${errMsg}&#96; });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '连接测试失败';\\\\\\\\n    const isAbort = msg.includes('abort') || msg.includes('timeout');\\\\\\\\n    res.json({\\\\\\\\n      code: -1,\\\\\\\\n      message: isAbort ? '连接超时，请检查网络或 Base URL' : &#96;连接失败: ${msg}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 设为默认配置 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function setDefaultConfig(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const conn = await pool.getConnection();\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      await conn.beginTransaction();\\\\\\\\n      await conn.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 0');\\\\\\\\n      const [result] = await conn.execute('UPDATE ai_config SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n      const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n      await conn.commit();\\\\\\\\n      if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n        return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '配置不存在' });\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      res.json({ code: 0, message: '已设为默认' });\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      conn.release();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('setDefaultConfig:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '操作失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":238,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":8862,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\config.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":238}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"707a7760-890d-4036-8253-db7cd5a66696\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"024e8aa2-4eae-44f1-910c-4f45d91819ca\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-19T13:03:26.428Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e4e554ce-6017-4515-b81d-6e88488d542\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_e4e554ce-6017-4515-b81d-6e88488d542\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\npc.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\npc.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\npc.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 角色 NPC 控制器\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { chatCompletion } from '../utils/llmClient.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取 NPC 列表，支持筛选 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getNpcList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { category, status } = req.query;\\\\\\\\n    let sql = &#96;SELECT n.id, n.name, n.description, n.background, n.personality,\\\\\\\\n      n.gender, n.age, n.occupation, n.voice_tone, n.avatar,\\\\\\\\n      n.ai_config_id, n.system_prompt, n.category, n.prompt_type, n.status, n.sort,\\\\\\\\n      n.created_at, n.updated_at, c.name as ai_config_name, c.provider\\\\\\\\n      FROM npc n LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id WHERE 1=1&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const params: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (category) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND n.category = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(category as string);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined &amp;&amp; status !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND n.status = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(Number(status));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY n.sort ASC, n.id DESC';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getNpcList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 根据 ID 获取单个 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getNpcById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT n.*, c.name as ai_config_name FROM npc n\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE n.id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getNpcById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 新增 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, description, background, personality, gender, age, occupation, voice_tone, avatar, ai_config_id, system_prompt, category, prompt_type, status, sort } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !ai_config_id) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '角色名称和 AI 配置为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO npc (name, description, background, personality, gender, age, occupation, voice_tone, avatar, ai_config_id, system_prompt, category, prompt_type, status, sort)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        description || null,\\\\\\\\n        background || null,\\\\\\\\n        personality || null,\\\\\\\\n        gender || null,\\\\\\\\n        age || null,\\\\\\\\n        occupation || null,\\\\\\\\n        voice_tone || null,\\\\\\\\n        avatar || null,\\\\\\\\n        ai_config_id,\\\\\\\\n        system_prompt || null,\\\\\\\\n        category || 'custom',\\\\\\\\n        prompt_type || 'high',\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        sort ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const insertId = (result as { insertId: number }).insertId;\\\\\\\\n    res.status(201).json({ code: 0, data: { id: insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const fields = ['name', 'description', 'background', 'personality', 'gender', 'age', 'occupation', 'voice_tone', 'avatar', 'ai_config_id', 'system_prompt', 'category', 'prompt_type', 'status', 'sort'];\\\\\\\\n    for (const f of fields) {\\\\\\\\n      if (body[f] !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n        updates.push(&#96;${f} = ?&#96;);\\\\\\\\n        params.push(body[f]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE npc SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** AI 自动生成角色内容（简介、背景、性格、系统提示词） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function generateNpcContent(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as { ai_config_id: number; name?: string; hint?: string };\\\\\\\\n    const { ai_config_id, name, hint } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!ai_config_id) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '请选择 AI 配置' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const inputText = [name?.trim(), hint?.trim()].filter(Boolean).join('。') || '';\\\\\\\\n    if (!inputText) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '请至少填写角色名称或补充描述' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, provider, api_key, base_url, model, max_tokens FROM ai_config WHERE id = ? AND status = 1',\\\\\\\\n      [ai_config_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'AI 配置不存在或已禁用' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const cfg = list[0] as { api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string; max_tokens: number };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const prompt = &#96;你是一个游戏/小说角色设定助手。请根据用户描述，生成一个完整的 AI NPC 角色设定。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n用户输入：${inputText}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请严格按以下 JSON 格式返回，不要添加任何其他文字或说明：\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"角色简介，1-2句话，用于列表展示\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"background\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"详细背景故事，含出身、经历、关系等，100-300字\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"personality\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"性格特质与待人方式，如：开朗/冷淡、谨慎/冲动\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gender\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"性别：male/female/other/unknown 之一\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"age\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"年龄：具体数字或描述如青年、中年\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"occupation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"职业\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"voice_tone\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"说话风格/语气，如：温和、爽朗、沉稳\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"完整的系统提示词，含人设、口吻、行为约束，可直接用作 AI 对话的角色设定\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const content = await chatCompletion(\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        api_key: cfg.api_key!,\\\\\\\\n        base_url: cfg.base_url,\\\\\\\\n        provider: cfg.provider,\\\\\\\\n        model: cfg.model,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens: cfg.max_tokens,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],\\\\\\\\n      { timeout: 45000, max_tokens: 1500 }\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const parsed = parseNpcGenerateJson(content);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: parsed });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '生成失败';\\\\\\\\n    console.error('generateNpcContent:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: msg });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 从 LLM 返回文本中提取并解析 JSON */\\\\\\\\nfunction parseNpcGenerateJson(text: string): {\\\\\\\\n  description: string;\\\\\\\\n  background: string;\\\\\\\\n  personality: string;\\\\\\\\n  gender: string;\\\\\\\\n  age: string;\\\\\\\\n  occupation: string;\\\\\\\\n  voice_tone: string;\\\\\\\\n  system_prompt: string;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  let raw = text.trim();\\\\\\\\n  const jsonBlock = raw.match(/&#96;&#96;&#96;(?:json)?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?)&#96;&#96;&#96;/);\\\\\\\\n  if (jsonBlock) {\\\\\\\\n    raw = jsonBlock[1]!.trim();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const fallback = { description: '', background: '', personality: '', gender: '', age: '', occupation: '', voice_tone: '', system_prompt: '' };\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const obj = JSON.parse(raw) as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      description: String(obj.description ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      background: String(obj.background ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      personality: String(obj.personality ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      gender: String(obj.gender ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      age: String(obj.age ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      occupation: String(obj.occupation ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      voice_tone: String(obj.voice_tone ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      system_prompt: String(obj.system_prompt ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return fallback;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM npc WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":237}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\npc.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 角色 NPC 控制器\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { chatCompletion } from '../utils/llmClient.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取 NPC 列表，支持筛选 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getNpcList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { category, status } = n.ai_config_id, n.system_prompt, n.category, n.prompt_type, n.status, n.sort,\\\\\\\\n      n.created_at, n.updated_at, c.name as ai_config_name, c.provider\\\\\\\\n      FROM npc n LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id WHERE 1=1&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const params: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (category) {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND n.category = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(category as string);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined &amp;&amp; status !== '') {\\\\\\\\n      sql += ' AND n.status = ?';\\\\\\\\n      params.push(Number(status));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    sql += ' ORDER BY n.sort ASC, n.id DESC';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(sql, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getNpcList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 根据 ID 获取单个 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getNpcById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT n.*, c.name as ai_config_name FROM npc n\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE n.id = ?&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getNpcById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 新增 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, description, background, personality, gender, age, occupation, voice_tone, avatar, ai_config_id, system_prompt, category, prompt_type, status, sort } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !ai_config_id) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '角色名称和 AI 配置为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO npc (name, description, background, personality, gender, age, occupation, voice_tone, avatar, ai_config_id, system_prompt, category, prompt_type, status, sort)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        description || null,\\\\\\\\n        background || null,\\\\\\\\n        personality || null,\\\\\\\\n        gender || null,\\\\\\\\n        age || null,\\\\\\\\n        occupation || null,\\\\\\\\n        voice_tone || null,\\\\\\\\n        avatar || null,\\\\\\\\n        ai_config_id,\\\\\\\\n        system_prompt || null,\\\\\\\\n        category || 'custom',\\\\\\\\n        prompt_type || 'high',\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        sort ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const insertId = (result as { insertId: number }).insertId;\\\\\\\\n    res.status(201).json({ code: 0, data: { id: insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const fields = ['name', 'description', 'background', 'personality', 'gender', 'age', 'occupation', 'voice_tone', 'avatar', 'ai_config_id', 'system_prompt', 'category', 'prompt_type', 'status', 'sort'];\\\\\\\\n    for (const f of fields) {\\\\\\\\n      if (body[f] !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n        updates.push(&#96;${f} = ?&#96;);\\\\\\\\n        params.push(body[f]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE npc SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** AI 自动生成角色内容（简介、背景、性格、系统提示词） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function generateNpcContent(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as { ai_config_id: number; name?: string; hint?: string };\\\\\\\\n    const { ai_config_id, name, hint } = body;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (!ai_config_id) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '请选择 AI 配置' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const inputText = [name?.trim(), hint?.trim()].filter(Boolean).join('。') || '';\\\\\\\\n    if (!inputText) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '请至少填写角色名称或补充描述' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT id, provider, api_key, base_url, model, max_tokens FROM ai_config WHERE id = ? AND status = 1',\\\\\\\\n      [ai_config_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as unknown[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'AI 配置不存在或已禁用' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const cfg = list[0] as { api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string; max_tokens: number };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const prompt = &#96;你是一个游戏/小说角色设定助手。请根据用户描述，生成一个完整的 AI NPC 角色设定。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n用户输入：${inputText}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n请严格按以下 JSON 格式返回，不要添加任何其他文字或说明：\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"角色简介，1-2句话，用于列表展示\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"background\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"详细背景故事，含出身、经历、关系等，100-300字\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"personality\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"性格特质与待人方式，如：开朗/冷淡、谨慎/冲动\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gender\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"性别：male/female/other/unknown 之一\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"age\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"年龄：具体数字或描述如青年、中年\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"occupation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"职业\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"voice_tone\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"说话风格/语气，如：温和、爽朗、沉稳\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"完整的系统提示词，含人设、口吻、行为约束，可直接用作 AI 对话的角色设定\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n}&#96;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const content = await chatCompletion(\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        api_key: cfg.api_key!,\\\\\\\\n        base_url: cfg.base_url,\\\\\\\\n        provider: cfg.provider,\\\\\\\\n        model: cfg.model,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens: cfg.max_tokens,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],\\\\\\\\n      { timeout: 45000, max_tokens: 1500 }\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const parsed = parseNpcGenerateJson(content);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: parsed });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '生成失败';\\\\\\\\n    console.error('generateNpcContent:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: msg });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 从 LLM 返回文本中提取并解析 JSON */\\\\\\\\nfunction parseNpcGenerateJson(text: string): {\\\\\\\\n  description: string;\\\\\\\\n  background: string;\\\\\\\\n  personality: string;\\\\\\\\n  gender: string;\\\\\\\\n  age: string;\\\\\\\\n  occupation: string;\\\\\\\\n  voice_tone: string;\\\\\\\\n  system_prompt: string;\\\\\\\\n} {\\\\\\\\n  let raw = text.trim();\\\\\\\\n  const jsonBlock = raw.match(/&#96;&#96;&#96;(?:json)?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?)&#96;&#96;&#96;/);\\\\\\\\n  if (jsonBlock) {\\\\\\\\n    raw = jsonBlock[1]!.trim();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  const fallback = { description: '', background: '', personality: '', gender: '', age: '', occupation: '', voice_tone: '', system_prompt: '' };\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const obj = JSON.parse(raw) as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n    return {\\\\\\\\n      description: String(obj.description ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      background: String(obj.background ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      personality: String(obj.personality ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      gender: String(obj.gender ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      age: String(obj.age ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      occupation: String(obj.occupation ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      voice_tone: String(obj.voice_tone ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n      system_prompt: String(obj.system_prompt ?? ''),\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return fallback;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除 NPC */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteNpc(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM npc WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteNpc:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":237,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":8697,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\npc.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":237}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"5335ab0f-4de5-4f63-890d-fa49d24e9385\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"6e81c9a6-a8df-43a4-8c9c-b901c3210c94\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\
