* NPC 记忆管理 - 查看、编辑、删除、反思\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { chatCompletion } from '../utils/llmClient.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取某 NPC 的最近思考记录（wander/对话思考，按时间倒序，供轮询实时展示） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getRecentThoughts(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, npc_id, type, description, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc_memory\\\\\\\\n       WHERE npc_id = ? AND type IN ('wander', 'conversation')\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY created_at DESC\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 50&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getRecentThoughts:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取思考记录失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取某 NPC 的记忆列表 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getMemories(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, npc_id, conversation_id, type, description, importance, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc_memory\\\\\\\\n       WHERE npc_id = ?\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY importance DESC, id DESC\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 100&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getMemories:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取记忆失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除记忆 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteMemory(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = Number(req.params.id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM npc_memory WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '记忆不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '已删除' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteMemory:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新记忆（description、importance） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateMemory(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = Number(req.params.id);\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as { description?: string; importance?: number };\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const vals: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (typeof body.description === 'string') {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('description = ?');\\\\\\\\n      vals.push(body.description);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (typeof body.importance === 'number') {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('importance = ?');\\\\\\\\n      vals.push(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, body.importance)));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    vals.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE npc_memory SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, vals);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '已更新' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateMemory:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 手动触发反思：从近期记忆提炼洞察 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function reflectMemories(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [npcRows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT n.id, n.name, c.api_key, c.base_url, c.provider, c.model, c.max_tokens\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc n\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE n.id = ? AND n.status = 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const npcList = npcRows as { id: number; name: string; api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string; max_tokens: number }[];\\\\\\\\n    if (npcList.length === 0 || !npcList[0].api_key?.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在或未配置 AI' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const npc = npcList[0];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT description FROM npc_memory WHERE npc_id = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30',\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const memories = (rows as { description: string }[]).map((r) =&gt; r.description);\\\\\\\\n    if (memories.length &lt; 3) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '记忆不足 3 条，无法反思' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const prompt = &#96;你是${npc.name}。以下是近期记忆列表：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n${memories.map((m, i) =&gt; &#96;${i + 1}. ${m}&#96;).join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请从这些记忆中提炼 3 条高层级洞察或认知，每条 1 句话。直接输出，每行一条。&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const resp = await chatCompletion(\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        api_key: npc.api_key!,\\\\\\\\n        base_url: npc.base_url,\\\\\\\\n        provider: npc.provider,\\\\\\\\n        model: npc.model,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens: npc.max_tokens,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      [{ role: 'user' as const, content: prompt }],\\\\\\\\n      { timeout: 20000, max_tokens: 300 }\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const lines = resp\\\\\\\\n      .split('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n')\\\\\\\\n      .map((s) =&gt; s.trim())\\\\\\\\n      .filter((s) =&gt; s.length &gt; 0);\\\\\\\\n    let added = 0;\\\\\\\\n    for (const line of lines.slice(0, 3)) {\\\\\\\\n      await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n        'INSERT INTO npc_memory (npc_id, type, description, importance) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)',\\\\\\\\n        [npc_id, 'reflection', line, 0.7]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      added++;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: &#96;已生成 ${added} 条反思&#96;, data: { added } });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '反思失败';\\\\\\\\n    console.error('reflectMemories:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: msg });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":161}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\memory.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * NPC 记忆管理 - 查看、编辑、删除、反思\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { chatCompletion } from '../utils/llmClient.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取某 NPC 的最近思考记录（wander/对话思考，按时间倒序，供轮询实时展示） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getRecentThoughts(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, npc_id, type, description, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc_memory\\\\\\\\n       WHERE npc_id = ? AND type IN ('wander', 'conversation')\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY created_at DESC\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 50&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getRecentThoughts:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取思考记录失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取某 NPC 的记忆列表 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getMemories(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, npc_id, conversation_id, type, description, importance, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc_memory\\\\\\\\n       WHERE npc_id = ?\\\\\\\\n       ORDER BY importance DESC, id DESC\\\\\\\\n       LIMIT 100&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getMemories:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取记忆失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除记忆 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteMemory(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = Number(req.params.id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute('DELETE FROM npc_memory WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const affected = (result as { affectedRows: number }).affectedRows;\\\\\\\\n    if (affected === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '记忆不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '已删除' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteMemory:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新记忆（description、importance） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateMemory(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const id = Number(req.params.id);\\\\\\\\n    const body = req.body as { description?: string; importance?: number };\\\\\\\\n    if (!id || isNaN(id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const vals: (string | number)[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    if (typeof body.description === 'string') {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('description = ?');\\\\\\\\n      vals.push(body.description);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (typeof body.importance === 'number') {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('importance = ?');\\\\\\\\n      vals.push(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, body.importance)));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    vals.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE npc_memory SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, vals);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '已更新' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateMemory:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 手动触发反思：从近期记忆提炼洞察 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function reflectMemories(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const npc_id = Number(req.query.npc_id);\\\\\\\\n    if (!npc_id || isNaN(npc_id)) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'npc_id 必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const [npcRows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT n.id, n.name, c.api_key, c.base_url, c.provider, c.model, c.max_tokens\\\\\\\\n       FROM npc n\\\\\\\\n       LEFT JOIN ai_config c ON n.ai_config_id = c.id\\\\\\\\n       WHERE n.id = ? AND n.status = 1&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const npcList = npcRows as { id: number; name: string; api_key: string | null; base_url: string | null; provider: string; model: string; max_tokens: number }[];\\\\\\\\n    if (npcList.length === 0 || !npcList[0].api_key?.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'NPC 不存在或未配置 AI' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const npc = npcList[0];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      'SELECT description FROM npc_memory WHERE npc_id = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30',\\\\\\\\n      [npc_id]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const memories = (rows as { description: string }[]).map((r) =&gt; r.description);\\\\\\\\n    if (memories.length &lt; 3) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '记忆不足 3 条，无法反思' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const prompt = &#96;你是${npc.name}。以下是近期记忆列表：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n${memories.map((m, i) =&gt; &#96;${i + 1}. ${m}&#96;).join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n')}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n请从这些记忆中提炼 3 条高层级洞察或认知，每条 1 句话。直接输出，每行一条。&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    const resp = await chatCompletion(\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        api_key: npc.api_key!,\\\\\\\\n        base_url: npc.base_url,\\\\\\\\n        provider: npc.provider,\\\\\\\\n        model: npc.model,\\\\\\\\n        max_tokens: npc.max_tokens,\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      [{ role: 'user' as const, content: prompt }],\\\\\\\\n      { timeout: 20000, max_tokens: 300 }\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const lines = resp\\\\\\\\n      .split('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n')\\\\\\\\n      .map((s) =&gt; s.trim())\\\\\\\\n      .filter((s) =&gt; s.length &gt; 0);\\\\\\\\n    let added = 0;\\\\\\\\n    for (const line of lines.slice(0, 3)) {\\\\\\\\n      await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n        'INSERT INTO npc_memory (npc_id, type, description, importance) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)',\\\\\\\\n        [npc_id, 'reflection', line, 0.7]\\\\\\\\n      );\\\\\\\\n      added++;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: &#96;已生成 ${added} 条反思&#96;, data: { added } });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : '反思失败';\\\\\\\\n    console.error('reflectMemories:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: msg });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":161,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":6120,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\memory.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":161}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"dfd67bd8-8cd5-4afc-b59c-4bdeaa93e873\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"077c8337-97f5-4ce9-b0ab-7197d343452d\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[] * 物品 CRUD 控制器\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 物品列表 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getItemList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM item ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC&#96;\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getItemList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取物品列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 物品详情 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getItemById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute('SELECT * FROM item WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '物品不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getItemById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 创建物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort } = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !footprint) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'name、footprint 为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const footprintStr = typeof footprint === 'string' ? footprint : JSON.stringify(footprint);\\\\\\\\n    const metaStr = metadata ? (typeof metadata === 'string' ? metadata : JSON.stringify(metadata)) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO item (name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        category || 'object',\\\\\\\\n        description || null,\\\\\\\\n        footprintStr,\\\\\\\\n        tile_value ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        is_blocking ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        metaStr,\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        sort ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const r = result as { insertId: number };\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: { id: r.insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort } = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (name !== undefined) { updates.push('name = ?'); params.push(name); }\\\\\\\\n    if (category !== undefined) { updates.push('category = ?'); params.push(category); }\\\\\\\\n    if (description !== undefined) { updates.push('description = ?'); params.push(description); }\\\\\\\\n    if (footprint !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('footprint = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(typeof footprint === 'string' ? footprint : JSON.stringify(footprint));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (tile_value !== undefined) { updates.push('tile_value = ?'); params.push(tile_value); }\\\\\\\\n    if (is_blocking !== undefined) { updates.push('is_blocking = ?'); params.push(is_blocking); }\\\\\\\\n    if (metadata !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('metadata = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(metadata ? (typeof metadata === 'string' ? metadata : JSON.stringify(metadata)) : null);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined) { updates.push('status = ?'); params.push(status); }\\\\\\\\n    if (sort !== undefined) { updates.push('sort = ?'); params.push(sort); }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE item SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute('DELETE FROM item WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":117}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\item.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 物品 CRUD 控制器\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { Request, Response } from 'express';\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 物品列表 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getItemList(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;SELECT id, name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort, created_at\\\\\\\\n       FROM item ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC&#96;\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: rows });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getItemList:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取物品列表失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 物品详情 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getItemById(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const [rows] = await pool.execute('SELECT * FROM item WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    const list = rows as Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;[];\\\\\\\\n    if (list.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(404).json({ code: -1, message: '物品不存在' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: list[0] });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('getItemById:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '获取物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 创建物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function createItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort } = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    if (!name || !footprint) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: 'name、footprint 为必填' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const footprintStr = typeof footprint === 'string' ? footprint : JSON.stringify(footprint);\\\\\\\\n    const metaStr = metadata ? (typeof metadata === 'string' ? metadata : JSON.stringify(metadata)) : null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const [result] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n      &#96;INSERT INTO item (name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort)\\\\\\\\n       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n      [\\\\\\\\n        name,\\\\\\\\n        category || 'object',\\\\\\\\n        description || null,\\\\\\\\n        footprintStr,\\\\\\\\n        tile_value ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        is_blocking ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        metaStr,\\\\\\\\n        status ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n        sort ?? 0,\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n    const r = result as { insertId: number };\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, data: { id: r.insertId }, message: '创建成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('createItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '创建物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 更新物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function updateItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    const { name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, is_blocking, metadata, status, sort } = req.body;\\\\\\\\n    const updates: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n    const params: unknown[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (name !== undefined) { updates.push('name = ?'); params.push(name); }\\\\\\\\n    if (category !== undefined) { updates.push('category = ?'); params.push(category); }\\\\\\\\n    if (description !== undefined) { updates.push('description = ?'); params.push(description); }\\\\\\\\n    if (footprint !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('footprint = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(typeof footprint === 'string' ? footprint : JSON.stringify(footprint));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (tile_value !== undefined) { updates.push('tile_value = ?'); params.push(tile_value); }\\\\\\\\n    if (is_blocking !== undefined) { updates.push('is_blocking = ?'); params.push(is_blocking); }\\\\\\\\n    if (metadata !== undefined) {\\\\\\\\n      updates.push('metadata = ?');\\\\\\\\n      params.push(metadata ? (typeof metadata === 'string' ? metadata : JSON.stringify(metadata)) : null);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (status !== undefined) { updates.push('status = ?'); params.push(status); }\\\\\\\\n    if (sort !== undefined) { updates.push('sort = ?'); params.push(sort); }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\\\\\\\\n      return res.status(400).json({ code: -1, message: '无有效更新字段' });\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    params.push(id);\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute(&#96;UPDATE item SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?&#96;, params);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '更新成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('updateItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '更新物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 删除物品 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deleteItem(req: Request, res: Response) {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { id } = req.params;\\\\\\\\n    await pool.execute('DELETE FROM item WHERE id = ?', [id]);\\\\\\\\n    res.json({ code: 0, message: '删除成功' });\\\\\\\\n  } catch (err) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('deleteItem:', err);\\\\\\\\n    res.status(500).json({ code: -1, message: '删除物品失败' });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":117,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":4550,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\controllers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\item.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":117}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"859aee16-eaee-4945-b05f-74c1bb866d9e\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"f2bf7b74-1927-48e6-99ee-7fa8e958f3e5\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\ gentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-19T13:03:26.428Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_df13d024-e8ff-4f9a-ad61-2e4d47eb15c\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_df13d024-e8ff-4f9a-ad61-2e4d47eb15c\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\services\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\itemMap.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\services\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\itemMap.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\services\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\itemMap.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 物品-地图相关服务\\\\\\\\n * 根据 item_map_binding + item.footprint 推导 tile_data\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 用于推导的 binding 结构（含 item 信息） */\\\\\\\\nexport interface BindingInput {\\\\\\\\n  item_id?: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_x: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_y: number;\\\\\\\\n  rotation?: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** 完整定义时使用 */\\\\\\\\n  name?: string;\\\\\\\\n  category?: string;\\\\\\\\n  description?: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint?: number[][];\\\\\\\\n  tile_value?: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 旋转变换 footprint：0=不转, 1=90°顺, 2=180°, 3=270°顺，(0,0)为锚点 */\\\\\\\\nfunction rotateFootprint(footprint: number[][], rotation: number): number[][] {\\\\\\\\n  if (rotation === 0) return footprint;\\\\\\\\n  let rows = footprint.length;\\\\\\\\n  let cols = rows &gt; 0 ? (footprint[0]?.length ?? 0) : 0;\\\\\\\\n  let grid = footprint.map((r) =&gt; [...r]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let r = 0; r &lt; rotation; r++) {\\\\\\\\n    const next: number[][] = [];\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; cols; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      const row: number[] = [];\\\\\\\\n      for (let y = rows - 1; y &gt;= 0; y--) {\\\\\\\\n        row.push(grid[y]?.[x] ?? 0);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      next.push(row);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    grid = next;\\\\\\\\n    rows = grid.length;\\\\\\\\n    cols = grid[0]?.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return grid;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 根据 mapId 的 item_map_binding 推导 tile_data\\\\\\\\n * 合并规则：先全 0，再按 binding.id 升序遍历，footprint 中为 1 的格子写入 item.tile_value\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deriveTileDataFromItems(\\\\\\\\n  mapId: number,\\\\\\\\n  width: number,\\\\\\\\n  height: number\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;number[][]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT b.id, b.pos_x, b.pos_y, COALESCE(b.rotation, 0) as rotation, i.footprint, i.tile_value\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ?\\\\\\\\n     ORDER BY b.id ASC&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const bindings = rows as { id: number; pos_x: number; pos_y: number; rotation: number; footprint: string | number[][]; tile_value: number }[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const grid: number[][] = Array.from({ length: height }, () =&gt; Array(width).fill(0));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    let footprint: number[][];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      footprint = typeof b.footprint === 'string' ? JSON.parse(b.footprint) : b.footprint;\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!Array.isArray(footprint) || footprint.length === 0) continue;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const rotated = rotateFootprint(footprint, Number(b.rotation) || 0);\\\\\\\\n    const fh = rotated.length;\\\\\\\\n    const fw = rotated[0]?.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n    const px = Number(b.pos_x) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const py = Number(b.pos_y) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const tv = Number(b.tile_value) || 1;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (let fy = 0; fy &lt; fh; fy++) {\\\\\\\\n      for (let fx = 0; fx &lt; fw; fx++) {\\\\\\\\n        if (rotated[fy]?.[fx] !== 1) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const gx = px + fx;\\\\\\\\n        const gy = py + fy;\\\\\\\\n        if (gx &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gx &lt; width &amp;&amp; gy &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gy &lt; height) {\\\\\\\\n          grid[gy]![gx] = tv;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return grid;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 收集地图上使用的 tile_value 对应的 tile_types（用于 metadata） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getTileTypesForMap(mapId: number): Promise&lt;Record&lt;number, { name: string; color: string }&gt;&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT DISTINCT i.tile_value, i.name, i.metadata\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ? AND i.tile_value &gt; 0&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const list = rows as { tile_value: number; name: string; metadata: string | null }[];\\\\\\\\n  const result: Record&lt;number, { name: string; color: string }&gt; = {};\\\\\\\\n  const defaultColors: Record&lt;number, string&gt; = {\\\\\\\\n    1: '#444444',\\\\\\\\n    2: '#5dade2',\\\\\\\\n    3: '#2874a6',\\\\\\\\n    4: '#27ae60',\\\\\\\\n    5: '#e74c3c',\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of list) {\\\\\\\\n    const v = Number(r.tile_value);\\\\\\\\n    if (v &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; !result[v]) {\\\\\\\\n      let color = defaultColors[v] ?? '#444444';\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const meta = r.metadata ? JSON.parse(r.metadata) : null;\\\\\\\\n        if (meta?.color) color = String(meta.color).replace(/^#?/, '#');\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        /* ignore */\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      result[v] = { name: r.name || &#96;障碍${v}&#96;, color };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return result;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 从 tile_data 二维数组推导 tile_data（用于内存中的 items 合并，不入库）\\\\\\\\n * bindings 含 item 的 footprint、tile_value、pos、rotation\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function deriveTileDataFromBindings(\\\\\\\\n  width: number,\\\\\\\\n  height: number,\\\\\\\\n  bindings: { footprint: number[][]; tile_value: number; pos_x: number; pos_y: number; rotation?: number }[]\\\\\\\\n): number[][] {\\\\\\\\n  const grid: number[][] = Array.from({ length: height }, () =&gt; Array(width).fill(0));\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    const rotated = rotateFootprint(b.footprint, Number(b.rotation) || 0);\\\\\\\\n    const fh = rotated.length;\\\\\\\\n    const fw = rotated[0]?.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n    const px = Number(b.pos_x) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const py = Number(b.pos_y) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const tv = Number(b.tile_value) || 1;\\\\\\\\n    for (let fy = 0; fy &lt; fh; fy++) {\\\\\\\\n      for (let fx = 0; fx &lt; fw; fx++) {\\\\\\\\n        if (rotated[fy]?.[fx] !== 1) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const gx = px + fx;\\\\\\\\n        const gy = py + fy;\\\\\\\\n        if (gx &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gx &lt; width &amp;&amp; gy &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gy &lt; height) {\\\\\\\\n          grid[gy]![gx] = tv;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return grid;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 获取 binding 在世界上障碍格子的坐标集合（用于 nearby 判定） */\\\\\\\\nexport function getBindingWorldObstacleCells(b: {\\\\\\\\n  footprint: number[][] | string;\\\\\\\\n  pos_x: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_y: number;\\\\\\\\n  rotation?: number;\\\\\\\\n}): Set&lt;string&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  let footprint: number[][];\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    footprint = typeof b.footprint === 'string' ? JSON.parse(b.footprint) : b.footprint;\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return new Set();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  if (!Array.isArray(footprint) || footprint.length === 0) return new Set();\\\\\\\\n  const rotated = rotateFootprint(footprint, Number(b.rotation) || 0);\\\\\\\\n  const px = Number(b.pos_x) || 0;\\\\\\\\n  const py = Number(b.pos_y) || 0;\\\\\\\\n  const cells = new Set&lt;string&gt;();\\\\\\\\n  for (let fy = 0; fy &lt; rotated.length; fy++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let fx = 0; fx &lt; (rotated[0]?.length ?? 0); fx++) {\\\\\\\\n      if (rotated[fy]?.[fx] === 1) cells.add(&#96;${px + fx},${py + fy}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return cells;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 检查 (nx,ny) 是否在 cells 的 1 格范围内（曼哈顿距离） */\\\\\\\\nexport function isWithin1OfCells(nx: number, ny: number, cells: Set&lt;string&gt;): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  for (const c of cells) {\\\\\\\\n    const [cx, cy] = c.split(',').map(Number);\\\\\\\\n    if (Math.abs(nx - cx) + Math.abs(ny - cy) &lt;= 1) return true;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return false;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 地图物品 binding 结构（用于 NPC 附近物品判定） */\\\\\\\\nexport interface MapItemBindingForNearby {\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint: string | number[][];\\\\\\\\n  pos_x: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_y: number;\\\\\\\\n  rotation?: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 获取地图上所有物品 binding（含名称、footprint、位置），供 NPC 附近物品判定\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getMapItemBindingsForNearby(mapId: number): Promise&lt;MapItemBindingForNearby[]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT i.name, i.footprint, b.pos_x, b.pos_y, COALESCE(b.rotation, 0) as rotation\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ?\\\\\\\\n     ORDER BY b.id ASC&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return rows as MapItemBindingForNearby[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 根据 NPC 位置与物品 bindings，返回其 1 格范围内的物品名称列表\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function getNearbyItemNames(\\\\\\\\n  nx: number,\\\\\\\\n  ny: number,\\\\\\\\n  bindings: MapItemBindingForNearby[]\\\\\\\\n): string[] {\\\\\\\\n  const names: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    const cells = getBindingWorldObstacleCells(b);\\\\\\\\n    if (isWithin1OfCells(nx, ny, cells)) {\\\\\\\\n      const name = (b.name || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n      if (name &amp;&amp; !names.includes(name)) names.push(name);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return names;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 按 name + footprint(JSON) 查找或创建 item，返回 item_id */\\\\\\\\nexport async function findOrCreateItem(def: {\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  category?: string;\\\\\\\\n  description?: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint: number[][];\\\\\\\\n  tile_value?: number;\\\\\\\\n  metadata?: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}): Promise&lt;number&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const footprintStr = JSON.stringify(def.footprint);\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    'SELECT id FROM item WHERE name = ? AND footprint = ? LIMIT 1',\\\\\\\\n    [def.name, footprintStr]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const list = rows as { id: number }[];\\\\\\\\n  if (list.length &gt; 0) return list[0]!.id;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const metaStr = def.metadata ? JSON.stringify(def.metadata) : null;\\\\\\\\n  const [ins] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;INSERT INTO item (name, category, description, footprint, tile_value, metadata)\\\\\\\\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [\\\\\\\\n      def.name,\\\\\\\\n      def.category || 'object',\\\\\\\\n      def.description || null,\\\\\\\\n      footprintStr,\\\\\\\\n      def.tile_value ?? 1,\\\\\\\\n      metaStr,\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return (ins as { insertId: number }).insertId;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":270}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\services\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\itemMap.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 物品-地图相关服务\\\\\\\\n * 根据 item_map_binding + item.footprint 推导 tile_data\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { pool } from '../db/connection.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 用于推导的 binding 结构（含 item 信息） */\\\\\\\\nexport interface BindingInput {\\\\\\\\n  item_id?: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_x: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_y: number;\\\\\\\\n  rotation?: number;\\\\\\\\n  /** 完整定义时使用 */\\\\\\\\n  name?: string;\\\\\\\\n  category?: string;\\\\\\\\n  description?: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint?: number[][];\\\\\\\\n  tile_value?: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 旋转变换 footprint：0=不转, 1=90°顺, 2=180°, 3=270°顺，(0,0)为锚点 */\\\\\\\\nfunction rotateFootprint(footprint: number[][], rotation: number): number[][] {\\\\\\\\n  if (rotation === 0) return footprint;\\\\\\\\n  let rows = footprint.length;\\\\\\\\n  let cols = rows &gt; 0 ? (footprint[0]?.length ?? 0) : 0;\\\\\\\\n  let grid = footprint.map((r) =&gt; [...r]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (let r = 0; r &lt; rotation; r++) {\\\\\\\\n    const next: number[][] = [];\\\\\\\\n    for (let x = 0; x &lt; cols; x++) {\\\\\\\\n      const row: number[] = [];\\\\\\\\n      for (let y = rows - 1; y &gt;= 0; y--) {\\\\\\\\n        row.push(grid[y]?.[x] ?? 0);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      next.push(row);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    grid = next;\\\\\\\\n    rows = grid.length;\\\\\\\\n    cols = grid[0]?.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return grid;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 根据 mapId 的 item_map_binding 推导 tile_data\\\\\\\\n * 合并规则：先全 0，再按 binding.id 升序遍历，footprint 中为 1 的格子写入 item.tile_value\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function deriveTileDataFromItems(\\\\\\\\n  mapId: number,\\\\\\\\n  width: number,\\\\\\\\n  height: number\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;number[][]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT b.id, b.pos_x, b.pos_y, COALESCE(b.rotation, 0) as rotation, i.footprint, i.tile_value\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ?\\\\\\\\n     ORDER BY b.id ASC&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const bindings = rows as { id: number; pos_x: number; pos_y: number; rotation: number; footprint: string | number[][]; tile_value: number }[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const grid: number[][] = Array.from({ length: height }, () =&gt; Array(width).fill(0));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    let footprint: number[][];\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      footprint = typeof b.footprint === 'string' ? JSON.parse(b.footprint) : b.footprint;\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      continue;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!Array.isArray(footprint) || footprint.length === 0) continue;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const rotated = rotateFootprint(footprint, Number(b.rotation) || 0);\\\\\\\\n    const fh = rotated.length;\\\\\\\\n    const fw = rotated[0]?.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n    const px = Number(b.pos_x) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const py = Number(b.pos_y) || 0;\\\\\\\\n    const tv = Number(b.tile_value) || 1;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (let fy = 0; fy &lt; fh; fy++) {\\\\\\\\n      for (let fx = 0; fx &lt; fw; fx++) {\\\\\\\\n        if (rotated[fy]?.[fx] !== 1) continue;\\\\\\\\n        const gx = px + fx;\\\\\\\\n        const gy = py + fy;\\\\\\\\n        if (gx &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gx &lt; width &amp;&amp; gy &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; gy &lt; height) {\\\\\\\\n          grid[gy]![gx] = tv;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return grid;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 收集地图上使用的 tile_value 对应的 tile_types（用于 metadata） */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getTileTypesForMap(mapId: number): Promise&lt;Record&lt;number, { name: string; color: string }&gt;&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT DISTINCT i.tile_value, i.name, i.metadata\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ? AND i.tile_value &gt; 0&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  const list = rows as { tile_value: number; name: string; metadata: string | null }[];\\\\\\\\n  const result: Record&lt;number, { name: string; color: string }&gt; = {};\\\\\\\\n  const defaultColors: Record&lt;number, string&gt; = {\\\\\\\\n    1: '#444444',\\\\\\\\n    2: '#5dade2',\\\\\\\\n    3: '#2874a6',\\\\\\\\n    4: '#27ae60',\\\\\\\\n    5: '#e74c3c',\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n  for (const r of list) {\\\\\\\\n    const v = Number(r.tile_value);\\\\\\\\n    if (v &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; !result[v]) {\\\\\\\\n      let color = defaultColors[v] ?? '#444444';\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const meta = r.metadata ? JSON.parse(r.metadata) : null;\\\\\\\\n        if (meta?.color) color = String(meta.color).replace(/^#?/, '#');\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        /* ignore */\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      result[v] = { name: r.name || &#96;障碍${v}&#96;, color };\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return result;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 从 tile_data 二维数组推导 tile_data（用于内存中的 items 合并，不入库）\\\\\\\\n * bindings 含 item 的 footprint、tile_value、pos、rotation\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function deriveTileDataFromBindings(\\\\\\\\n  width: number,\\\\\\\\n  height: number,\\\\\\\\n  bindings: { footprint: number[][]; tile_value: number; pos_x: number; pos_y: number; rotation?: number }[]\\\\\\\\n): number[][] {\\\\\\\\n  const grid: number[][] = Array.from({ length: height }, () =&gt; Array(width).fill(0));\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    const rotated = rotateFootprint(b.footprint, Number(b.rotation) || 0);\\\\\\\\n    const fh = rotated.length;\\\\\\\\n    const fw = rotated[0]?.length ?? fy &lt; rotated.length; fy++) {\\\\\\\\n    for (let fx = 0; fx &lt; (rotated[0]?.length ?? 0); fx++) {\\\\\\\\n      if (rotated[fy]?.[fx] === 1) cells.add(&#96;${px + fx},${py + fy}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return cells;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 检查 (nx,ny) 是否在 cells 的 1 格范围内（曼哈顿距离） */\\\\\\\\nexport function isWithin1OfCells(nx: number, ny: number, cells: Set&lt;string&gt;): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  for (const c of cells) {\\\\\\\\n    const [cx, cy] = c.split(',').map(Number);\\\\\\\\n    if (Math.abs(nx - cx) + Math.abs(ny - cy) &lt;= 1) return true;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return false;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 地图物品 binding 结构（用于 NPC 附近物品判定） */\\\\\\\\nexport interface MapItemBindingForNearby {\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint: string | number[][];\\\\\\\\n  pos_x: number;\\\\\\\\n  pos_y: number;\\\\\\\\n  rotation?: number;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 获取地图上所有物品 binding（含名称、footprint、位置），供 NPC 附近物品判定\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function getMapItemBindingsForNearby(mapId: number): Promise&lt;MapItemBindingForNearby[]&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const [rows] = await pool.execute(\\\\\\\\n    &#96;SELECT i.name, i.footprint, b.pos_x, b.pos_y, COALESCE(b.rotation, 0) as rotation\\\\\\\\n     FROM item_map_binding b\\\\\\\\n     JOIN item i ON b.item_id = i.id\\\\\\\\n     WHERE b.map_id = ?\\\\\\\\n     ORDER BY b.id ASC&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    [mapId]\\\\\\\\n  );\\\\\\\\n  return rows as MapItemBindingForNearby[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 根据 NPC 位置与物品 bindings，返回其 1 格范围内的物品名称列表\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function getNearbyItemNames(\\\\\\\\n  nx: number,\\\\\\\\n  ny: number,\\\\\\\\n  bindings: MapItemBindingForNearby[]\\\\\\\\n): string[] {\\\\\\\\n  const names: string[] = [];\\\\\\\\n  for (const b of bindings) {\\\\\\\\n    const cells = getBindingWorldObstacleCells(b);\\\\\\\\n    if (isWithin1OfCells(nx, ny, cells)) {\\\\\\\\n      const name = (b.name || '').trim();\\\\\\\\n      if (name &amp;&amp; !names.includes(name)) names.push(name);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return names;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 按 name + footprint(JSON) 查找或创建 item，返回 item_id */\\\\\\\\nexport async function findOrCreateItem(def: {\\\\\\\\n  name: string;\\\\\\\\n  category?: string;\\\\\\\\n  description?: string;\\\\\\\\n  footprint: number[][];\\\\\\\\n  tile_value?: number;\\\\\\\\n  metadata?: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;;\\\\\\\\n}): Promise&lt;number&gt; * WebSocket 服务\\\\\\\\n * 鉴权：URL 携带 token；多用户隔离：按 mapId 分组\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { WebSocketServer, WebSocket } from 'ws';\\\\\\\\nimport type { Server } from 'http';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 期望的 token（开发期可从 env 配置，正式环境应从 session/JWT 校验） */\\\\\\\\nconst EXPECTED_TOKEN = process.env.WS_TOKEN || 'ainpc-dev-token';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 按 mapId 分组的客户端 Set */\\\\\\\\nconst mapClients = new Map&lt;string, Set&lt;WebSocket&gt;&gt;();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction getOrCreateRoom(mapId: string): Set&lt;WebSocket&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  let set = mapClients.get(mapId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set) {\\\\\\\\n    set = new Set();\\\\\\\\n    mapClients.set(mapId, set);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return set;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction leaveRoom(ws: WebSocket, mapId: string | null) {\\\\\\\\n  if (mapId) {\\\\\\\\n    const set = mapClients.get(mapId);\\\\\\\\n    if (set) {\\\\\\\\n      set.delete(ws);\\\\\\\\n      if (set.size === 0) mapClients.delete(mapId);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 向某地图的所有订阅者推送 */\\\\\\\\nexport function broadcastToMap(mapId: string, payload: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;) {\\\\\\\\n  const set = mapClients.get(mapId);\\\\\\\\n  if (!set) return;\\\\\\\\n  const data = JSON.stringify(payload);\\\\\\\\n  for (const client of set) {\\\\\\\\n    if (client.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\\\\\\\\n      client.send(data);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 启动 WebSocket 服务 */\\\\\\\\nexport function initWsServer(httpServer: Server) {\\\\\\\\n  const wss = new WebSocketServer({\\\\\\\\n    server: httpServer,\\\\\\\\n    path: '/ws',\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  wss.on('connection', (ws, req) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const url = new URL(req.url || '', &#96;http://${req.headers.host}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    const token = url.searchParams.get('token');\\\\\\\\n    const mapId = url.searchParams.get('mapId');\\\\\\\\n    const userId = url.searchParams.get('userId') || 'anonymous';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // 鉴权\\\\\\\\n    if (token !== EXPECTED_TOKEN) {\\\\\\\\n      ws.close(4001, 'Unauthorized');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    if (!mapId) {\\\\\\\\n      ws.close(4002, 'mapId required');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const room = getOrCreateRoom(mapId);\\\\\\\\n    room.add(ws);\\\\\\\\n    (ws as WebSocket &amp; { mapId?: string; userId?: string }).mapId = mapId;\\\\\\\\n    (ws as WebSocket &amp; { mapId?: string; userId?: string }).userId = userId;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'connected', mapId, userId }));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    ws.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const ext = ws as WebSocket &amp; { mapId?: string };\\\\\\\\n      leaveRoom(ws, ext.mapId || null);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    ws.on('error', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      const ext = ws as WebSocket &amp; { mapId?: string };\\\\\\\\n      leaveRoom(ws, ext.mapId || null);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log('📡 WebSocket 已启动: /ws');\\\\\\\\n  return wss;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":89}\\\",\\\"toolCallBinary\\\":\\\"QgA=\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"d:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\backend\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\server.ts\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/**\\\\\\\\n * 对话 API - 用户与 NPC 聊天\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport axios from 'axios'\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst api = axios.create({\\\\\\\\n  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE || 'http://localhost:3000/api',\\\\\\\\n  timeout: 60000, // 对话接口 LLM 调用较慢\\\\\\\\n})\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface ApiResponse&lt;T&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  code: number\\\\\\\\n  data?: T\\\\\\\\n  message?: string\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 对话请求参数 */\\\\\\\\nexport interface ChatParams {\\\\\\\\n  npc_id: number\\\\\\\\n  session_id?: string\\\\\\\\n  user_input: number\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 发送消息与 NPC 对话 */\\\\\\\\nexport function chat(params: ChatParams) {\\\\\\\\n  return api.post&lt;ApiResponse&lt;ChatResult&gt;&gt;('/conversation/chat', params)\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 流式对话：逐字返回，onChunk 接收内容片段，onDone 接收完整结果 */\\\\\\\\nexport async function chatStream(\\\\\\\\n  params: ChatParams,\\\\\\\\n  callbacks: {\\\\\\\\n    onChunk: (content: string) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n    onDone: (result: { message_id: number; session_id: string; conversation_id: number }) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n    onError?: (message: string) =&gt; void\\\\\\\\n 10, height: 10 })\\\\\\\\nconst editMapId = ref&lt;number | null&gt;(null)\\\\\\\\nconst editLoading = ref(false)\\\\\\\\n/** 默认障碍类型（手动创建时使用） */\\\\\\\\nconst DEFAULT_TILE_TYPES: Record&lt;number, { name: string; color: string }&gt; = {\\\\\\\\n  1: { name: '建筑', color: '#444444' },\\\\\\\\n  2: { name: '喷泉', color: '#5dade2' },\\\\\\\\n  3: { name: '水域', color: '#2874a6' clickedNpcName = computed(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!clickedNpcId.value) return ''\\\\\\\\n  const b = bindings.value.find((x) =&gt; x.npc_id === clickedNpcId.value)\\\\\\\\n  if (b?.npc_name) return * 通用 LLM 调用工具（OpenAI 兼容 Chat Completions API）\\\\\\\\n * 用于连接测试、角色生成等场景，自动记录 AI 调用日志\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { PROVIDER_BASE_URLS } from './providerDefaults.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { logAiCall } from './aiLogger.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport interface LlmConfig {\\\\\\\\n  api_key: string\\\\\\\\n  base_url?: string | null\\\\\\\\n  provider: string\\\\\\\\n  model?: string\\\\\\\\n  max_tokens?: number\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/** 日志上下文，可选传给 chatCompletion / chatCompletionStream / embedText */\\\\\\\\nexport interface LogContext {\\\\\\\\n  source?: string\\\\\\\\n  ai_config_id?: number\\\\\\\\n  context?: Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * 调用 LLM 生成文本\\\\\\\\n * @param config AI 配置信息\\\\\\\\n * @param messages 消息列表\\\\\\\\n * @param options 超时等选项，可含 logContext 用于日志\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport async function chatCompletion(\\\\\\\\n  config: LlmConfig,\\\\\\\\n  messages: Array&lt;{ role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'; content: string }&gt;,\\\\\\\\n  options?: { timeout?: number; max_tokens?: number; logContext?: LogContext }\\\\\\\\n): Promise&lt;string&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  const { api_key, base_url, provider, model } = config\\\\\\\\n  if (!api_key?.trim()) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error('该配置未设置 API Key')\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const base = (base_url &amp;&amp; base_url.trim()) || PROVIDER_BASE_URLS[provider] || 'https://api.openai.com/v1'\\\\\\\\n  const url = base.replace(/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/$/, '') + '/chat/completions'\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const body = {\\\\\\\\n    model: model || 'gpt-3.5-turbo',\\\\\\\\n    messages,\\\\\\\\n    max_tokens: options?.max_tokens ?? config.max_tokens ?? 2000,\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const start = Date.now()\\\\\\\\n  const logCtx = options?.logContext\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const timeout = options?.timeout ?? 30000\\\\\\\\n  const controller = new AbortController()\\\\\\\\n  const timer = setTimeout(() =&gt; controller.abort(), timeout)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const resp = await fetch(url, {\\\\\\\\n    method: 'POST',\\\\\\\\n    headers: {\\\\\\\\n      'Content-Type': 'application/json',\\\\\\\\n      Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${api_key}&#96;,\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    body: JSON.stringify(body),\\\\\\\\n    signal: controller.signal,\\\\\\\\n  })\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  clearTimeout(timer)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const duration = Date.now() - start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  if (!resp.ok) {\\\\\\\\n    const errText = await resp.text()\\\\\\\\n    let errMsg = &#96;HTTP ${resp.status}&#96;\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const errJson = JSON.parse(errText)\\\\\\\\n      errMsg = errJson.error?.message || errJson.message || errText.slice(0, 300) || errMsg\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      errMsg = errText.slice(0, 300) || errMsg\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const requestContent = messages.map((m) =&gt; &#96;[${m.role}]: ${m.content}&#96;).join('\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n');\\\\\\\\n    logAiCall({\\\\\\\\n      api_type: setup lang=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * AI 配置列表组件 - 使用 Element Plus 组件\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'\\\\\\\\nimport { ElMessageBox } from getConfigList, deleteConfig, setDefaultConfig, testConnection } from '../api/config'\\\\\\\\nimport { PROVIDER_OPTIONS } from '../constants/providers'\\\\\\\\nimport ConfigForm from './ConfigForm.vue'\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst list = ref&lt;AiConfig[]&gt;([])\\\\\\\\nconst loading = ref(false)\\\\\\\\nconst filterProvider = ref('')\\\\\\\\nconst filterStatus = ref&lt;number | ''&gt;('')\\\\\\\\nconst formVisible = ref(false)\\\\\\\\nconst editId = ref&lt;number | null&gt;(null)\\\\\\\\nconst testingId = ref&lt;number | null&gt;(null)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function loadList() {\\\\\\\\n  loading.value = true\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const { data } = await getConfigList({\\\\\\\\n      provider: filterProvider.value || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      status: filterStatus.value === '' ? undefined : filterStatus.value,\\\\\\\\n    })\\\\\\\\n    if (data.code === 0 &amp;&amp; data.data) {\\\\\\\\n      list.value = data.data\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n 3:03:26.432Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"thinking\\\":{\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"cee21782-f9d7-4e37-a3cb-baf55d9a1f1a\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"23bf5feb-3e27-4543-9723-068513aad1e2\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-02-19T13:03:26.432Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\n整理后的项目梳理报告如下。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# AINPC 项目梳理报告\\\\n\\\\n## 1. 项目结构\\\\n\\\\n### 1.1 根目录概览\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nd:\\\\\\\\MyWeb\\\\\\\\AINPC\\\\\\\\\\\\n├── frontend/          # Vue3 前端\\\\n├── backend/           # Node.js 后端\\\\n├── .specstory/        # 历史记录\\\\n├── README.md\\\\n└── 需求.md\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 1.2 Frontend 目录结构\\\\n\\\\n| 路径 | 说明 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;src/main.ts&#96; | 入口：Vue + Element Plus + Vue3Toastify |\\\\n| &#96;src/App.vue&#96; | 主布局，5 个 Tab：AI配置、角色 NPC、物品、对话、地图 |\\\\n| &#96;src/components/&#96; | 页面级组件 |\\\\n| &#96;src/api/&#96; | 各业务 API 封装 |\\\\n| &#96;src/types/&#96; | TS 类型 |\\\\n| &#96;src/constants/&#96; | 常量（providers、npc、item） |\\\\n| &#96;src/utils/&#96; | 工具（avatar.ts） |\\\\n| &#96;src/style.css&#96; | 全局样式 |\\\\n\\\\n主要组件：\\\\n- &#96;ConfigList.vue&#96; / &#96;ConfigForm.vue&#96;：AI 配置\\\\n- &#96;NpcList.vue&#96; / &#96;NpcForm.vue&#96;：NPC CRUD\\\\n- &#96;ItemList.vue&#96; / &#96;ItemForm.vue&#96;：物品\\\\n- &#96;ChatView.vue&#96; / &#96;ChatPanel.vue&#96;：用户-NPC 对话\\\\n- &#96;MapView.vue&#96;：Phaser 地图与 NPC 展示\\\\n- &#96;MemoryDrawer.vue&#96; / &#96;NpcThinkingDrawer.vue&#96;：记忆与思考记录\\\\n\\\\n### 1.3 Backend 目录结构\\\\n\\\\n| 路径 | 说明 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;src/index.ts&#96; | 入口：挂载路由、WebSocket、启动 wander |\\\\n| &#96;src/routes/&#96; | 路由定义（config、npc、conversation、memory、upload、map、item、aiLog） |\\\\n| &#96;src/controllers/&#96; | 业务逻辑（对应路由） |\\\\n| &#96;src/services/&#96; | 领域服务（wander、itemMap） |\\\\n| &#96;src/db/&#96; | DB 连接、Redis、schema、迁移脚本 |\\\\n| &#96;src/ws/&#96; | WebSocket 服务 |\\\\n| &#96;src/utils/&#96; | llmClient、aiLogger、providerDefaults |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. 技术栈\\\\n\\\\n### 2.1 前端\\\\n\\\\n| 类型 | 技术 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| 框架 | Vue 3 + TypeScript |\\\\n| 构建 | Vite 7 |\\\\n| UI | Element Plus 2.x |\\\\n| 地图 | Phaser 3.90 |\\\\n| 请求 | axios |\\\\n| 提示 | vue3-toastify |\\\\n| 样式 | Tailwind CSS + PostCSS |\\\\n\\\\n### 2.2 后端\\\\n\\\\n| 类型 | 技术 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| 框架 | Express 4.x |\\\\n| 语言 | TypeScript (tsx 开发) |\\\\n| 数据库 | MySQL (mysql2) |\\\\n| 缓存 | Redis (ioredis) |\\\\n| 实时 | WebSocket (ws) |\\\\n| 文件 | multer |\\\\n\\\\n### 2.3 数据库\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;ai_config&#96;：AI 配置\\\\n- &#96;npc&#96;：角色\\\\n- &#96;npc_conversation&#96; / &#96;npc_message&#96;：用户-NPC 对话\\\\n- &#96;npc_memory&#96;：记忆、思考、反思\\\\n- &#96;game_map&#96;：地图\\\\n- &#96;item&#96; / &#96;item_map_binding&#96; / &#96;npc_map_item&#96;：物品及与地图、NPC 的关联\\\\n- &#96;npc_map_binding&#96;：NPC 与地图\\\\n- &#96;npc_npc_conversation&#96; / &#96;npc_npc_message&#96;：NPC 间对话\\\\n- &#96;ai_call_log&#96;：AI 调用日志\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. 核心功能与业务逻辑\\\\n\\\\n### 3.1 NPC 管理\\\\n\\\\n- 路由：&#96;/api/npc&#96;，controller：&#96;npc.ts&#96;\\\\n- CRUD + AI 生成角色内容（&#96;generateNpcContent&#96;）\\\\n- 关联 &#96;ai_config_id&#96; 指定 LLM\\\\n\\\\n### 3.2 地图\\\\n\\\\n- 路由：&#96;/api/map&#96;，controller：&#96;map.ts&#96;\\\\n- 地图 CRUD、AI 生成、&#96;item_map_binding&#96; 推导 &#96;tile_data&#96;\\\\n- 场景：&#96;initScene&#96; / &#96;startMap&#96; 将 &#96;npc_map_binding&#96; 写入 Redis\\\\n- 服务：&#96;itemMap.ts&#96; 做 &#96;footprint&#96;、&#96;tile_data&#96;、障碍推导\\\\n\\\\n### 3.3 对话\\\\n\\\\n- 路由：&#96;/api/conversation&#96;，controller：&#96;conversation.ts&#96;\\\\n- 普通对话：&#96;chat&#96;；流式：&#96;chatStream&#96;\\\\n- 流程：查 NPC → 会话管理 → 组装记忆与 system prompt → 调 LLM → 存消息 → 异步总结记忆\\\\n\\\\n### 3.4 记忆\\\\n\\\\n- 路由：&#96;/api/memory&#96;，controller：&#96;memory.ts&#96;\\\\n- 类型：&#96;conversation&#96;、&#96;reflection&#96;、&#96;wander&#96;\\\\n- 功能：列表、删除、更新、手动反思（&#96;reflectMemories&#96;）\\\\n- 对话后自动总结，支持 embedding 语义检索\\\\n\\\\n### 3.5 物品\\\\n\\\\n- 路由：&#96;/api/item&#96;，controller：&#96;item.ts&#96;\\\\n- 物品 CRUD，&#96;footprint&#96; 用于障碍推导\\\\n- &#96;item_map_binding&#96; 关联地图，&#96;npc_map_item&#96; 维护 nearby 关系（由 wander 更新）\\\\n\\\\n### 3.6 Wander（自主移动）\\\\n\\\\n- 服务：&#96;services/wander.ts&#96;\\\\n- 每 5 秒一次 tick，对未暂停地图的 NPC 做：\\\\n  - AI 决策移动\\\\n  - 距离 ≤2 触发 NPC-NPC 相遇对话\\\\n  - 更新 &#96;npc_map_item&#96; nearby 关系\\\\n- NPC 思考写入 &#96;npc_memory&#96; type=wander\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. 数据流\\\\n\\\\n### 4.1 分层结构\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nRoutes → Controllers → [Services] → DB/Redis\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- 多数模块：Route → Controller → pool/redis\\\\n- 地图、wander：Controller 使用 &#96;itemMap&#96;、&#96;wander&#96; 等服务\\\\n\\\\n### 4.2 API 与 Controller 对应\\\\n\\\\n| 模块 | 路由前缀 | Controller |\\\\n|------|----------|------------|\\\\n| 配置 | /api/config | config.ts |\\\\n| NPC | /api/npc | npc.ts |\\\\n| 对话 | /api/conversation | conversation.ts |\\\\n| 记忆 | /api/memory | memory.ts |\\\\n| 地图 | /api/map | map.ts |\\\\n| 物品 | /api/item | item.ts |\\\\n| 上传 | /api/upload | upload.ts |\\\\n| 日志 | /api/ai-logs | aiLog.ts |\\\\n\\\\n### 4.3 数据库与迁移\\\\n\\\\n- 初始化：&#96;db/init.ts&#96; 执行 &#96;schema.sql&#96;\\\\n- 模块级迁移：&#96;migrate-npc.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-conversation.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-memory.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-memory-embedding.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-map.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-ai-log.ts&#96;、&#96;migrate-item.ts&#96;\\\\n- 表结构主要在 &#96;schema.sql&#96; 定义，部分在迁移中补充\\\\n\\\\n### 4.4 Redis\\\\n\\\\n- NPC 位置：&#96;map:{mapId}:npc:{npcId}&#96;（x, y, state, groupId）\\\\n- NPC 集合：&#96;map:{mapId}:npcs&#96;\\\\n- 暂停：&#96;map:{mapId}:paused&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. 潜在问题与可优化点\\\\n\\\\n### 5.1 重复逻辑\\\\n\\\\n1. **前端 API 重复**\\\\n   - 每个 &#96;api/*.ts&#96; 单独创建 axios 实例、定义 &#96;ApiResponse&lt;T&gt;&#96;\\\\n   - 建议：抽 &#96;api/client.ts&#96; 统一 axios 与通用类型\\\\n\\\\n2. **conversation.ts 中 chat / chatStream**\\\\n   - 步骤 1–5 基本相同（查 NPC、会话、消息、记忆、组装 prompt）\\\\n   - 建议：提取公共函数 &#96;prepareChatContext&#96;，减少重复\\\\n\\\\n3. **memory.ts / conversation.ts 反思逻辑**\\\\n   - &#96;reflectOnMemories&#96; 与 conversation 里的 &#96;reflectOnMemories&#96; 相似\\\\n   - 建议：抽到 &#96;services/memoryReflect.ts&#96; 统一实现\\\\n\\\\n### 5.2 WebSocket 未完全打通\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;ws/server.ts&#96; 有 &#96;broadcastToMap&#96;，但全项目无调用\\\\n- 前端 &#96;MapView.vue&#96; 通过 &#96;getSceneState&#96; 轮询状态\\\\n- 建议：在 &#96;wander.ts&#96; 移动后调用 &#96;broadcastToMap&#96;，前端用 WebSocket 接收更新，减少轮询\\\\n\\\\n### 5.3 架构不一致\\\\n\\\\n1. **服务层**\\\\n   - 仅 map、item、wander 有独立 services\\\\n   - config、npc、conversation、memory 直接 controller → pool\\\\n   - 建议：对 config、npc、conversation、memory 逐步抽取 service 层，便于复用和测试\\\\n\\\\n2. **错误处理**\\\\n   - 各 controller 用 try/catch + &#96;res.status(500).json&#96;\\\\n   - 建议：使用统一错误中间件或 &#96;asyncHandler&#96; 包装\\\\n\\\\n### 5.4 可优化点\\\\n\\\\n1. **前端 API 超时**\\\\n   - config、map、npc 多为 10s，conversation 60s\\\\n   - 可统一在 axios 拦截器中设置超时与重试\\\\n\\\\n2. **地图轮询**\\\\n   - &#96;MapView.vue&#96; 固定间隔轮询 &#96;getSceneState&#96;\\\\n   - 启用 WebSocket 后可改为事件驱动，减少请求量\\\\n\\\\n3. **迁移脚本**\\\\n   - 迁移与 &#96;schema.sql&#96; 有部分重复定义（如 item 相关）\\\\n   - 建议：统一迁移入口或明确 schema 与 migrate 的职责划分\\\\n\\\\n4. **类型复用**\\\\n   - 前端 &#96;MemoryItem&#96; 定义在 &#96;conversation.ts&#96;\\\\n   - 建议：将共享类型集中到 &#96;types/&#96; 或单独 &#96;types/memory.ts&#96;\\\\n\\\\n5. **地图 controller 体积**\\\\n   - &#96;map.ts&#96; 约 600 行\\\\n   - 建议：按功能拆分（如 map-crud、map-scene、map-items）\\\\n\\\\n6. **上传路径**\\\\n   - &#96;npc.ts&#96; 中 &#96;uploadAvatar&#96; 用 fetch 且 baseURL 拼接逻辑略复杂\\\\n   - 建议：移到 &#96;api/upload.ts&#96;，与其他接口风格统一\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. 配置文件要点\\\\n\\\\n| 文件 | 作用 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;frontend/vite.config.ts&#96; | Vue + Tailwind PostCSS |\\\\n| &#96;frontend/.env.example&#96; | &#96;VITE_API_BASE&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;backend/.env.example&#96; | PORT、DB、REDIS_URL、WS_TOKEN、WANDER_USE_AI |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. 优化建议汇总（按优先级）\\\\n\\\\n| 优先级 | 建议 |\\\\n|--------|------|\\\\n| 高 | 抽取前端 axios 实例和通用 API 类型，消除重复 |\\\\n| 高 | 在 wander 中接入 WebSocket 推送，减少轮询 |\\\\n| 中 | 抽取 conversation 的 chat/chatStream 公共逻辑 |\\\\n| 中 | 统一记忆反思逻辑到 service 层 |\\\\n| 中 | 为 config/npc/conversation/memory 引入 service 层 |\\\\n| 低 | 拆分 map controller、统一错误处理、整理迁移脚本 |\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1771494678007,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"全面探索 项目结构\",\"isFileListExpanded\":false,\"browserChipManuallyDisabled\":false,\"browserChipManuallyEnabled\":false,\"unifiedMode\":\"agent\",\"forceMode\":\"edit\",\"usageData\":{},\"allAttachedFileCodeChunksUris\":[],\"modelConfig\":{\"modelName\":\"composer-1\",\"maxMode\":false},\"subComposerIds\":[],\"subagentComposerIds\":[],\"capabilityContexts\":[],\"todos\":[],\"isQueueExpanded\":true,\"hasUnreadMessages\":false,\"gitHubPromptDismissed\":false,\"totalLinesAdded\":0,\"totalLinesRemoved\":0,\"addedFiles\":0,\"removedFiles\":0,\"isDraft\":false,\"isCreatingWorktree\":false,\"isApplyingWorktree\":false,\"isUndoingWorktree\":false,\"applied\":false,\"pendingCreateWorktree\":false,\"worktreeStartedReadOnly\":false,\"isBestOfNSubcomposer\":false,\"isBestOfNParent\":false,\"bestOfNJudgeWinner\":false,\"isSpec\":false,\"isProject\":false,\"isSpecSubagentDone\":false,\"isContinuationInProgress\":false,\"stopHookLoopCount\":0,\"speculativeSummarizationEncryptionKey\":\"FnEtHdVp4LBjBIiHnwLBHqHQGuuXeTplGdaXTX35/e0=\",\"isNAL\":true,\"planModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"debugModeSuggestionUsed\":false,\"conversationState\":\"~\",\"queueItems\":[],\"blobEncryptionKey\":\"+OdbdapDjHUrIK3gebnX4ghDb68xA+rqlLYLJFLNAcM=\",\"isAgentic\":true}"

根据对项目的梳理，总结如下，并按优先级列出可选的优化方案，供你决定要执行哪些。

---

# AINPC 项目梳理报告

## 1. 项目概览

| 层级 | 技术 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 前端 | Vue 3 + Vite + Element Plus + Phaser | 5 个 Tab：AI 配置、NPC、物品、对话、地图 |
| 后端 | Express + MySQL + Redis + WebSocket | API + WebSocket 实时通信 |
| 核心 | NPC 自主移动 (wander)、记忆与反思、用户/NPC 对话、地图与物品 | |

## 2. 数据流与分层

```
前端 API → 后端 Routes → Controllers → DB/Redis
                            ↓
                      Services (wander, itemMap)
```

## 3. 存在的问题与优化建议

### 高优先级（影响重复和实时性）

| # | 问题 | 建议 | 影响范围 |
|---|------|------|----------|
| 1 | 每个 `api/*.ts` 各自创建 axios、定义 `ApiResponse<T>` | 抽成 `api/client.ts` 统一封装 | frontend/src/api/ |
| 2 | `MapView` 靠轮询获取 NPC 状态，WebSocket `broadcastToMap` 未使用 | 在 wander 移动后调用 `broadcastToMap`，前端用 WebSocket 接收 | backend/ws、wander；frontend/MapView |

### 中优先级（逻辑复用和架构）

| # | 问题 | 建议 | 影响范围 |
|---|------|------|----------|
| 3 | conversation 中 chat/chatStream 前 5 步逻辑重复 | 抽 `prepareChatContext` 等公共函数 | backend/controllers/conversation.ts |
| 4 | 记忆反思逻辑在 memory 与 conversation 中重复 | 抽到 `services/memoryReflect.ts` 统一实现 | backend/controllers、services |
| 5 | 仅 map/item/wander 有 service 层，其余直接在 controller 里操作 DB | 逐步为 config、npc、conversation、memory 增加 service 层 | backend/controllers、services |

### 低优先级（结构和可维护性）

| # | 问题 | 建议 | 影响范围 |
|---|------|------|----------|
| 6 | map controller 体积大（约 600 行） | 按职责拆成 map-crud、map-scene、map-items 等 | backend/controllers/map.ts |
| 7 | 错误处理分散在各 controller | 使用 asyncHandler + 统一错误中间件 | backend 全路由 |
| 8 | schema.sql 与 migrate 有部分重叠 | 明确 schema 与 migrate 职责，统一迁移入口 | backend/db/ |
| 9 | 共享类型分散在多处 | 集中到 `types/` 或 `types/memory.ts` 等 | frontend/src/types/ |
| 10 | 上传头像逻辑写在 npc 中，且用 fetch | 移到 `api/upload.ts`，与其他接口风格统一 | frontend/api、NpcForm |

---

- **B**：高 + 中（#1–#5）
- **C**：全部（#1–#10）
- **D**：仅指定项（请回复编号，如：1, 3, 5）

回复选项或编号后，我再按你的选择开始具体修改代码。

全部优化项已完成，前后端构建均已通过。修改摘要如下：

---

## 完成的优化

### 1. 前端 API 统一（#1）

- **`api/client.ts`**：统一 axios 实例与 `ApiResponse<T>` 类型
- 各模块 API 复用 `api` / `conversationApi`，移除重复定义

### 2. WebSocket 实时推送（#2）

- **backend**：`wander.ts` 在每轮 tick 后调用 `broadcastToMap` 推送 `sceneState`
- **backend**：`services/mapScene.ts` 抽离 `buildSceneState` 供 API 和 wander 共用
- **frontend**：`api/ws.ts` 封装 `connectMapScene`
- **MapView.vue**：地图运行时连接 WebSocket，收到推送即更新；保留 10s 轮询作为兜底

### 3. 对话公共逻辑（#3）

- **`services/conversationContext.ts`**：抽取 `prepareChatContext`
- **`controllers/conversation.ts`**：`chat` / `chatStream` 共用该函数，减少重复代码

### 4. 记忆反思统一（#4）

- **`services/memoryReflect.ts`**：统一实现 `reflectOnMemories`
- `conversation` 和 `memory` 控制器均调用该服务

### 5. 统一错误处理（#7）

- **`middleware/asyncHandler.ts`**：封装异步路由，统一捕获异常
- **`utils/httpError.ts`**：`HttpError` 支持自定义 status
- config、conversation、memory 路由均已使用 `asyncHandler` 包装

### 6. 迁移脚本整理（#8）

- **`db/README.md`**：补充迁移说明与执行顺序

### 7. 共享类型集中（#9）

- **`types/memory.ts`**：`MemoryItem`、`ThoughtItem`
- **`types/map.ts`**：`GameMap`、`MapBinding`、`NpcState`、`SceneState`、`MapItem`
- **`types/conversation.ts`**：`MessageRecord`、`ConversationItem`

### 8. 上传接口统一（#10）

- **`api/upload.ts`**：`uploadAvatar` 统一上传逻辑
- **`api/npc.ts`**：改为使用 `uploadAvatar`

---

## 暂未实施的优化

- **#5**：为 config、npc、conversation、memory 增加 service 层
- **#6**：拆分 map controller

---

## 配置说明

前端 WebSocket 使用环境变量 `VITE_WS_TOKEN`（默认 `ainpc-dev-token`），需与后端 `WS_TOKEN` 一致。

地图生成相关代码主要在以下文件中：

| 位置 | 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|------|
| **后端** | `backend/src/controllers/map.ts` | 核心逻辑：`generateMapContent`（约 119 行起） |
| **前端 API** | `frontend/src/api/map.ts` | `generateMapContent` 接口封装 |
| **前端组件** | `frontend/src/components/MapView.vue` | 调用 AI 生成地图的 UI 和流程 |

后端 `map.ts` 中的 `generateMapContent` 会：

1. 校验 AI 配置（`ai_config_id`）
2. 使用 `buildMapGeneratePrompt` 构造提示词
3. 调用 `chatCompletion` 生成地图 JSON（名称、尺寸、`tile_types`、`items` 等）
4. 解析 LLM 返回并处理物品入库

地图生成相关改动已全部完成，主要如下：

---

## 1. 提示词调整（去 AI 化、更现代）

**`backend/src/controllers/map.ts`** 中 `buildMapGeneratePrompt` 已重写：

| 改动点 | 说明 |
|--------|------|
| **角色设定** | 从“2D 地图生成器”改为“专业 2D 场景设计师” |
| **场景类型** | 支持联合办公、咖啡馆、创意工作室、现代公寓、科技园区、城市公园、购物中心、大学校园等 |
| **风格约束** | 明确避免“小镇广场”“两室一厅”等模板化布局，根据描述灵活设计 |
| **配色** | 推荐现代配色（如 #2c3e50 / #3498db / #1a1a2e 等），避免过于刺眼或俗气 |
| **示例** | 用“街角咖啡馆区”替代老旧“小镇广场”示例 |

---

## 2. 多轮对话支持

**后端**

- `generateMapContent` 支持 `current_map` 参数
- 传入 `current_map` 时，使用 `buildMapRefinePrompt` 做**修改**，而非重新生成
- 修改模式：把当前地图 JSON 和用户修改说明一并发送给 LLM，LLM 返回完整新地图 JSON

**前端**

- 首次生成后，按钮文案变为「继续完善」
- 输入框占位符改为：「输入修改要求，如：把喷泉移到左边、增加一个咖啡厅、扩大广场面积」
- 完善时自动把当前地图作为 `current_map` 传给 API，实现多轮修改

---

## 3. 使用流程

1. 初次生成：选择 AI 配置 → 输入描述（如“现代街角咖啡馆”）→ 点击「AI 生成」
2. 继续完善：在生成结果上输入修改要求（如“把露天座椅区移向东侧”）→ 点击「继续完善」
3. 可多次完善，每次在上一版基础上修改

前后端构建已通过。

---

[Issue with gpt-4-vision-preview API when passing base64 encoded image - API - OpenAI Developer Community](https://community.openai.com/t/issue-with-gpt-4-vision-preview-api-when-passing-base64-encoded-image/517532)<br/>3. [Images and vision \| OpenAI API](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/images-vision?api-mode=chat)<br/>4. [Using image urls in the chat completion endpoint for vision - Bugs - OpenAI Developer Community](https://community.openai.com/t/using-image-urls-in-the-chat-completion-endpoint-for-vision/965024)<br/>5. [Image upload in Chat Completions, Responses and Assistants - API / Bugs - OpenAI Developer Community](https://community.openai.com/t/image-upload-in-chat-completions-responses-and-assistants/1150458)<br/><br/># OpenAI Chat Completions API Vision with Base64 Images<br/><br/>The Chat Completions API supports vision capabilities for analyzing images, including base64-encoded images.[3]<br/><br/>## Base64 Image Format<br/><br/>When passing base64-encoded images to the Chat Completions API, use the `image_url` type with a data URL format:[5]<br/><br/>```<br/>\{<br/>  "type": "image_url",<br/>  "image_url": \{"url": "data:image/png;base64,\{base64_encoded_image\}"\}<br/>\}<br/>```<br/><br/>The content type should be specified in the data URL prefix (e.g., `data:image/png;base64,` for PNG images).[5]<br/><br/>## Considerations<br/><br/>While base64 image encoding generally works with vision models like GPT-4 Vision and o1, there have been reported issues where images occasionally fail to process, with the model responding with "Your image was empty."[5] This appears to be an edge case issue rather than a systematic problem, as base64 images work successfully in the majority of cases (93-97% success rate reported).[5]<br/><br/>For reliable image analysis, the Chat Completions API accepts images as input alongside text prompts in multimodal requests.[3] |

</details>
</tool-use>
