<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Handling content type**

I'm adjusting the request headers to let Axios handle Content-Type automatically for FormData by omitting it entirely. I'm letting Axios automatically handle FormData Content-Type by removing it from headers. I'm removing the default 'Content-Type': 'application/json' header to let Axios handle FormData correctly. I'm testing if passing `headers: { 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data' }` properly overrides the default header. I'm adjusting the request transformation to remove Content-Type header when body is FormData to avoid boundary issues. I'm removing the Content-Type header for FormData requests to let axios handle it automatically. </details></think>

---


室内布局图转地图的上传功能已接入，修改如下：

---

## 1. LLM Vision 支持（`backend/src/utils/llmClient.ts`）

- 新增 `MessageContent`：支持 `string` 或 `ContentPart[]`（文本 + 图片）
- `chatCompletion` 支持多模态：`content` 可为 `{ type: 'text', text }` 与 `{ type: 'image_url', image_url: { url } }`

## 2. 后端 API（`backend/src/controllers/map.ts` + `routes/map.ts`）

| 路由 | 方法 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| `/api/map/convert-layout` | POST | 上传室内布局图并转为地图 |

- **入参**：`multipart/form-data`，字段为 `file`、`ai_config_id`
- **限制**：图片 ≤ 5MB，支持 JPG、PNG、GIF、WebP
- **流程**：读取图片 → Base64 → 调用 Vision 模型 → 解析返回 JSON → 返回地图数据
- 临时文件处理：成功后删除 `uploads/layouts/` 中的临时文件

## 3. 前端（`frontend/src/components/MapView.vue`）

在「创建地图」弹窗的 AI 创建区域新增：

- **「或上传室内布局图」** 分隔线
- **「选择布局图并转换」** 按钮（使用 `el-upload`）
- 提示文案：支持户型图、平面图，需 Vision 模型（如 gpt-4o）

## 4. 使用步骤

1. 打开「创建地图」弹窗
2. 选择已配置的 AI 配置（**需支持视觉的模型**，如 gpt-4o、gpt-4-vision）
3. 点击「选择布局图并转换」，选择室内布局图 / 户型图 / 平面图
4. 等待 AI 解析并生成地图，预览区会显示结果
5. 可继续用文字完善或多轮修改后，点击「创建」完成创建

前后端构建均已通过。

已完成对创建地图弹窗的布局和样式调整，主要改动如下：

---

## 1. 弹窗整体

- 宽度由 480px 调整为 540px
- 增加 `align-center` 居中
- 为 header、body、footer 增加分隔线
- 使用统一的 padding 和 spacing

## 2. AI 创建区域

- 标题使用 `<h4>`，加强层级
- 背景改为 `var(--el-fill-color-light)`，与暗色主题一致
- 增加 1px 边框和 8px 圆角
- 选择框、文本框统一尺寸
- 「AI 生成」按钮单独成行并突出主操作

## 3. 「或上传室内布局图」分隔线

- 使用左右线条的视觉分隔（替代 el-divider）
- 中间文案加 padding 并降对比度
- 上传区域使用 flex 布局，按钮与说明文字分层展示

## 4. 表单布局

- 宽度、高度使用 `el-row` / `el-col` 并排显示（各占 12 列）
- 表单标签使用 `font-weight: 500`
- 表单项间距统一为 16px

## 5. 地图预览网格

- 格子尺寸改为 16px，并调整容器尺寸
- 增加内阴影以区分层级
- 悬停时增加 2px 描边反馈
- 图例使用 flex + gap 布局，调整圆点和文字间距

## 6. 工具栏

- 顶部操作区使用 `.map-view-toolbar` 统一间距和换行行为

<details>
            <summary>Tool use: **web_search** • Searched web `undefined` • **1** results</summary>
        
| Title | URL | Chunk |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Web search results for query: DeepSeek API vision image 图片识别 2024 |  | Links:<br/>1. [DeepSeek 图像识别 \| DeepSeek Image](https://deepseekimage.org/zh/features/image-recognition)<br/>2. [deepseek的api调用可以发图片吗](https://blog.moontak.com/id/504528/)<br/>3. [DeepSeek API调用全攻略：从后端接入到前端可视化实践](https://cloud.baidu.com/article/4402789)<br/>4. [如何给deepseek投喂图片数据](https://blog.moontak.com/id/513193/)<br/>5. [deepseek api 图像理解如何调用？ - CSDN文库](https://wenku.csdn.net/answer/24x9kj35w5)<br/><br/># DeepSeek API 图片识别能力总结（2024）<br/><br/>## API 图片上传支持<br/><br/>DeepSeek API 可以用于发送和处理图片。支持通过 API 接口上传图片的方式包括：<br/><br/>**API 接口上传**[2]<br/>使用 Python requests 库构建 POST 请求上传图片：<br/>```python<br/>import requests<br/>url = "https://api.deepseek.com/vision/upload"<br/>headers = \{'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN'\}<br/>files = \{'image': open('path_to_your_image.jpg', 'rb')\}<br/>response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, files=files)<br/>```<br/><br/>**图形化界面上传**[2]<br/>除 API 外，还提供网页界面支持拖拽或选择本地图片上传。<br/><br/>## 多模态功能现状<br/><br/>DeepSeek 的官方 API 目前主要面向**文本生成任务**，图像理解接口的支持情况不够明确[5]。若需使用图像理解功能，可考虑：<br/><br/>1. **结合多模态 API**[4]：使用 multipart/form-data 格式上传图片，调用 `/v1/vision` 端点<br/>2. **结合第三方图像 API**[4]：先用 Google Vision API 或 AWS Rekognition 解析图像，再将结果输入 DeepSeek 文本生成 API<br/><br/>## 图像识别能力<br/><br/>DeepSeek Image 平台提供的视觉识别功能包括[1]：<br/>- 高精度多语言 OCR（印刷文本准确率 >95%，手写文本 >85%）<br/>- 复杂视觉场景理解与上下文分析<br/>- 对象检测与分类<br/>- 支持 20+ 语言的文本提取和翻译<br/><br/>## 注意事项<br/><br/>支持常见图片格式（JPEG、PNG 等），单张图片大小不宜过大以避免传输超时[2]。建议查阅最新 DeepSeek 开发者文档确认具体功能支持情况。 |

</details>
</tool-use>

[Introducing LLaVA v1.5 7B: Fast Visual-Language AI \| Groq is fast, low cost inference.](https://groq.com/introducing-llava-v1-5-7b-on-groqcloud-unlocking-the-power-of-multimodal-ai/)<br/><br/># Groq API Vision Models (2024)<br/><br/>Groq offers vision capabilities through multimodal models that process both text and images with fast inference and low latency.[1]<br/><br/>## Current Vision Models<br/><br/>**Llama 4 Models (Latest):**<br/>- **Llama 4 Scout 17B**: `meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct` - A multimodal model supporting text and image inputs with multilingual, multi-turn conversations, tool use, and JSON mode.[1]<br/>- **Llama 4 Maverick 17B**: `meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct` - Similar capabilities to Scout, also in preview.[1]<br/><br/>Both models feature a 128K token context window and are currently in preview.[1]<br/><br/>**Earlier Model:**<br/>- **LLaVA v1.5 7B**: Based on Meta's Llama 2, combines language and vision for visual instruction following.[5]<br/><br/>## Image Specifications<br/><br/>For Llama 4 models:[1]<br/>- Maximum image URL size: 20MB<br/>- Maximum resolution: 33 megapixels per image<br/>- Base64 encoded image limit: 4MB<br/>- Maximum images per request: 5<br/><br/>## Use Cases<br/><br/>The vision models support:[1]<br/>- Visual question answering<br/>- Caption generation<br/>- Optical Character Recognition (OCR)<br/>- Structured data extraction from images<br/>- Bulk image analysis and tagging via Batch API[3]<br/><br/>Access these models through the Groq API's chat.completions endpoint or the GroqCloud Console Playground.[1] |

[DeepSeek-VL: Towards Real-World Vision-Language Understanding - 智源社区论文](https://hub.baai.ac.cn/paper/6eca5a2e-faec-4906-bc14-b5e58a650c04)<br/>2. [DeepSeek-VL2: Mixture-of-Experts Vision-Language Models for Advanced<br/>  Multimodal Understanding - 智源社区论文](https://hub.baai.ac.cn/paper/caa0510c-ad17-4171-84ba-64d5b7b90075)<br/>3. [DeepSeek-VL2 – DeepSeek最新开源的MoE视觉语言模型系列](https://ai-bot.cn/deepseek-vl2)<br/>4. [DeepSeek-VL2](https://baike.baidu.com/item/DeepSeek-VL2/65431563)<br/>5. [DeepSeek-VL2 AI 视觉模型开源：支持动态分辨率、处理科研图表、解析各种梗图等](https://finance.sina.com.cn/tech/digi/2024-12-14/doc-inczkwqz5069691.shtml)<br/><br/># DeepSeek 多模态视觉模型总结<br/><br/>## 模型名称<br/><br/>DeepSeek提供了两代视觉语言模型：<br/><br/>**第一代：DeepSeek-VL**[1]<br/>- 包含1.3B和7B两个版本<br/>- 2024年3月发布<br/><br/>**第二代：DeepSeek-VL2**[2][4]<br/>- 2024年12月13日发布，采用混合专家(MoE)架构<br/>- 包含三个版本：<br/>  - DeepSeek-VL2-Tiny（1.0B激活参数）<br/>  - DeepSeek-VL2-Small（2.8B激活参数）<br/>  - DeepSeek-VL2（4.5B激活参数）[2]<br/><br/>## 核心功能特性<br/><br/>**视觉能力**[2][5]<br/>- 采用动态切图策略支持不同分辨率图像<br/>- 最高支持1152×1152分辨率和1:9或9:1极端长宽比[5]<br/>- 支持高分辨率图像处理<br/><br/>**应用场景**[2]<br/>- 视觉问答(VQA)<br/>- 光学字符识别(OCR)<br/>- 文档/表格/图表理解<br/>- 视觉定位<br/>- 梗图理解和科研图表识别[5]<br/><br/>**语言架构**[2]<br/>- DeepSeek-VL2采用带多头潜在注意力机制的DeepSeekMoE模型<br/>- 通过压缩键值缓存实现高效推理和高吞吐量<br/><br/>DeepSeek-VL2相比前代在数据规模翻倍，性能大幅提升。[3] |

```json
{
```

```json
  "markdown": "Your First API Call | DeepSeek API Docs\n\nOn this page\n\n# Your First API Call\n\nThe DeepSeek API uses an API format compatible with OpenAI. By modifying the configuration, you can use the OpenAI SDK or softwares compatible with the OpenAI API to access the DeepSeek API.\n\n| PARAM | VALUE |\n| --- | --- |\n| base_url * | &#96;https://api.deepseek.com&#96; |\n| api_key | apply for an [API key](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys) |\n\n* To be compatible with OpenAI, you can also use&#96;https://api.deepseek.com/v1&#96; as the&#96;base_url&#96;. But note that the&#96;v1&#96; here has NO relationship with the model's version.\n\n* The&#96;deepseek-chat&#96; and&#96;deepseek-reasoner&#96; correspond to the model version DeepSeek-V3.2 (128K context limit), which differs from the APP/WEB version.&#96;deepseek-chat&#96; is the non-thinking mode of DeepSeek-V3.2 and&#96;deepseek-reasoner&#96; is the thinking mode of DeepSeek-V3.2.\n\n## Invoke The Chat API​\n\nOnce you have obtained an API key, you can access the DeepSeek API using the following example scripts. This is a non-stream example, you can set the&#96;stream&#96; parameter to&#96;true&#96; to get stream response.\n\n- nodejs\n- python\n- curl\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ncurl https://api.deepseek.com/chat/completions \\  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\  -H \"Authorization: Bearer ${DEEPSEEK_API_KEY}\" \\  -d '{        \"model\": \"deepseek-chat\",        \"messages\": [          {\"role\": \"system\", \"content\": \"You are a helpful assistant.\"},          {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello!\"}        ],        \"stream\": false      }'\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n- Invoke The Chat API"
}
```

[Image Processing Potential: DeepSeek API Image Input](https://mydeepseekapi.com/blog/image-processing-potential-deepseek-api-image-input)<br/>2. [DeepSeek API Docs - OpenAI Compatible API for Chat, Code & Reasoning](https://deepseeksr1.com/api-docs/)<br/>3. [Your First API Call \| DeepSeek API Docs](https://api-docs.deepseek.com/)<br/>4. [API Guide - DeepSeek](https://deep-seek.chat/docs/api/)<br/>5. [Run DeepSeek API - How to Use the DeepSeek API](https://www.clarifai.com/blog/how-to-use-the-deepseek-api)<br/><br/># DeepSeek OpenAI-Compatible API with Vision Support<br/><br/>## OpenAI Compatibility<br/><br/>DeepSeek's API is deliberately designed to be OpenAI-compatible.[2] You can use the standard OpenAI SDKs by simply changing the base URL to `https://api.deepseek.com` (or `https://api.deepseek.com/v1`) and providing your API key.[2][3] The API uses the same `/chat/completions` endpoint and `messages` structure as OpenAI.[2]<br/><br/>## Vision Model Support<br/><br/>DeepSeek offers image processing capabilities through multi-modal endpoints.[1] The API supports:<br/><br/>- **Input formats**: Base64-encoded strings, file uploads, and public URLs[1]<br/>- **Supported image types**: JPEG, PNG, and WEBP[1]<br/>- **Capabilities**: Layout detection, text extraction, caption generation, visual question answering, and contextual image understanding (not just OCR)[1]<br/><br/>## Integration with `image_url`<br/><br/>When using the vision model, you can combine image input with natural language prompts.[1] The API takes care of image preprocessing and can handle variable image quality reliably.[1]<br/><br/>## Available Models<br/><br/>The main models are:[2]<br/>- `deepseek-chat` – non-thinking mode<br/>- `deepseek-reasoner` – thinking mode with chain-of-thought reasoning<br/><br/>Both support 128K token context length and JSON output.[2] |

</details>
</tool-use>

I'm implementing vision model override for OpenAI and Groq with appropriate vision models. 

**Handling file uploads**

I'm checking how Element Plus Upload passes file data and whether FormData includes proper Content-Type headers. I'm adding vision model override logic for OpenAI providers to ensure proper image recognition support. </details></think>

| Web search results for query: DeepSeek API 图片 模型 deepseek-vl chat completions 2024 |  | Links:<br/>1. [DeepSeek-VL视觉语言模型：从入门到精通的完整指南](https://blog.gitcode.com/68c3bef756c8ca8eb147168409c61bc5.html)<br/>2. [以DeepSeek-VL为例，详解视觉语言模型原理及代码](https://qingkelab.github.io/LLM/2024-08-17/)<br/>3. [DeepSeek \| 深度求索](https://www.deepseek.com/whitepaper)<br/><br/># DeepSeek-VL 图片模型与 Chat Completions API 总结<br/><br/>## 模型概述<br/>DeepSeek-VL 是一个开源的多模态视觉语言模型，支持图像和文本的联合理解。核心模型为 `deepseek-vl-7b-chat`，可通过 HuggingFace 和 DeepSeek API 平台调用。[1][2]<br/><br/>## 模型架构<br/>DeepSeek-VL 由三个主要部分组成：[2]<br/>- **视觉编码器**：采用混合架构，结合 SigLIP-L 和 SAM-B 两个 ViT 模型，分别处理低分辨率（384×484）和高分辨率（1024×1024）图像<br/>- **视觉适配器**：使用 MLP 将视觉编码器输出映射到文本 embedding 空间<br/>- **LLM 核心**：基于 DeepSeek LLM 进行理解和生成<br/><br/>## 关键功能<br/>- **多图像处理**：支持同时处理多张图像进行对比分析[1]<br/>- **多种图像格式**：支持自然场景、技术图表、网页截图、科学文档等[1]<br/>- **图像理解任务**：图像描述生成、技术文档分析等[1]<br/><br/>## API 调用方式<br/>使用 Python 进行推理的基础配置：[2]<br/>```python<br/>from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM<br/>from deepseek_vl.models import VLChatProcessor<br/><br/>model_path = "deepseek-ai/deepseek-vl-7b-chat"<br/>vl_chat_processor = VLChatProcessor.from_pretrained(model_path)<br/>vl_gpt = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_path, trust_remote_code=True)<br/>```<br/><br/>## 部署方式<br/>支持本地部署和通过 DeepSeek 开放平台 API 调用。[3] 模型可在 24GB GPU 上运行，支持 FP16 优化。[1] |

</details>
</tool-use>

```json
{
  "url": "https://console.groq.com/docs/vision",
  "markdown": "# Images and Vision\n\nGroq API offers fast inference and low latency for multimodal models with vision capabilities for understanding and interpreting visual data from images. By analyzing the content of an image, multimodal models can generate human-readable text for providing insights about given visual data.\n\n## [Supported Models](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#supported-models)\n\nGroq API supports powerful multimodal models that can be easily integrated into your applications to provide fast and accurate image processing for tasks such as visual question answering, caption generation, and Optical Character Recognition (OCR).\n\nLlama 4 ScoutLlama 4 Maverick\n\n### [meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct](https://console.groq.com/docs/model/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct)\n\nModel ID\n\n&#96;meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct&#96;\n\nDescription\n\nA powerful multimodal model capable of processing both text and image inputs that supports multilingual, multi-turn conversations, tool use, and JSON mode.\n\nContext Window\n\n128K tokens\n\nPreview Model\n\nCurrently in preview and should be used for experimentation.\n\nImage Size Limit\n\nMaximum allowed size for a request containing an image URL as input is 20MB. Requests larger than this limit will return a 400 error.\n\nImage Resolution Limit\n\nMaximum allowed resolution for a request containing images is 33 megapixels (33177600 total pixels) per image. Images larger than this limit will return a 400 error.\n\nRequest Size Limit (Base64 Encoded Images)\n\nMaximum allowed size for a request containing a base64 encoded image is 4MB. Requests larger than this limit will return a 413 error.\n\nImages per Request\n\nYou can process a maximum of 5 images.\n\n### [meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct](https://console.groq.com/docs/model/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct)\n\nModel ID\n\n&#96;meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct&#96;\n\nDescription\n\nA powerful multimodal model capable of processing both text and image inputs that supports multilingual, multi-turn conversations, tool use, and JSON mode.\n\nContext Window\n\n128K tokens\n\nPreview Model\n\nCurrently in preview and should be used for experimentation.\n\nImage Size Limit\n\nMaximum allowed size for a request containing an image URL as input is 20MB. Requests larger than this limit will return a 400 error.\n\nImage Resolution Limit\n\nMaximum allowed resolution for a request containing images is 33 megapixels (33177600 total pixels) per image. Images larger than this limit will return a 400 error.\n\nRequest Size Limit (Base64 Encoded Images)\n\nMaximum allowed size for a request containing a base64 encoded image is 4MB. Requests larger than this limit will return a 413 error.\n\nImages per Request\n\nYou can process a maximum of 5 images.\n\n## [How to Use Vision](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#how-to-use-vision)\n\nUse Groq API vision features via:\n\n- Groq API Request: Call the [chat.completions](https://console.groq.com/docs/text-chat#generating-chat-completions-with-groq-sdk) API endpoint and set the model to\n&#96;meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct&#96;\nor\n&#96;meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct&#96;\n. See code examples below.\n- GroqCloud Console Playground: Use [Llama 4 Scout](https://console.groq.com/playground?model=meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct) or [Llama 4 Maverick](https://console.groq.com/playground?model=meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct) as the model and upload your image.\n\n## [How to Pass Images from URLs as Input](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#how-to-pass-images-from-urls-as-input)\n\nThe following are code examples for passing your image to the model via a URL:\n\ncurlJavaScriptPythonJSON\n\nPython\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfrom groq import Groq\nimport os\n\nclient = Groq(api_key=os.environ.get(\"GROQ_API_KEY\"))\ncompletion = client.chat.completions.create(\n    model=\"meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct\",\n    messages=[\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"What's in this image?\"\n                },\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"image_url\",\n                    \"image_url\": {\n                        \"url\": \"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f2/LPU-v1-die.jpg\"\n                    }\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n    ],\n    temperature=1,\n    max_completion_tokens=1024,\n    top_p=1,\n    stream=False,\n    stop=None,\n)\n\nprint(completion.choices[0].message)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## [How to Pass Locally Saved Images as Input](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#how-to-pass-locally-saved-images-as-input)\n\nTo pass locally saved images, we'll need to first encode our image to a base64 format string before passing it as the &#96;image_url&#96; in our API request as follows:\n\nPython\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfrom groq import Groq\nimport base64\nimport os\n\n# Function to encode the image\ndef encode_image(image_path):\n  with open(image_path, \"rb\") as image_file:\n    return base64.b64encode(image_file.read()).decode('utf-8')\n\n# Path to your image\nimage_path = \"sf.jpg\"\n\n# Getting the base64 string\nbase64_image = encode_image(image_path)\n\nclient = Groq(api_key=os.environ.get(\"GROQ_API_KEY\"))\n\nchat_completion = client.chat.completions.create(\n    messages=[\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \"What's in this image?\"},\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"image_url\",\n                    \"image_url\": {\n                        \"url\": f\"data:image/jpeg;base64,{base64_image}\",\n                    },\n                },\n            ],\n        }\n    ],\n    model=\"meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct\",\n)\n\nprint(chat_completion.choices[0].message.content)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## [Tool Use with Images](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#tool-use-with-images)\n\nThe &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct&#96;, &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct&#96; models support tool use! The following cURL example defines a &#96;get_current_weather&#96; tool that the model can leverage to answer a user query that contains a question about the weather along with an image of a location that the model can infer location (i.e. New York City) from:\n\nshell\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ncurl https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions -s \\\n-H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n-H \"Authorization: Bearer $GROQ_API_KEY\" \\\n-d '{\n\"model\": \"meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct\",\n\"messages\": [\n{\n    \"role\": \"user\",\n    \"content\": [{\"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \"Whats the weather like in this state?\"}, {\"type\": \"image_url\", \"image_url\": { \"url\": \"https://cdn.britannica.com/61/93061-050-99147DCE/Statue-of-Liberty-Island-New-York-Bay.jpg\"}}]\n}\n],\n\"tools\": [\n{\n    \"type\": \"function\",\n    \"function\": {\n    \"name\": \"get_current_weather\",\n    \"description\": \"Get the current weather in a given location\",\n    \"parameters\": {\n        \"type\": \"object\",\n        \"properties\": {\n        \"location\": {\n            \"type\": \"string\",\n            \"description\": \"The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA\"\n        },\n        \"unit\": {\n            \"type\": \"string\",\n            \"enum\": [\"celsius\", \"fahrenheit\"]\n        }\n        },\n        \"required\": [\"location\"]\n    }\n    }\n}\n],\n\"tool_choice\": \"auto\"\n}' | jq '.choices[0].message.tool_calls'\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe following is the output from our example above that shows how our model inferred the state as New York from the given image and called our example function:\n\nPython\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[\n  {\n    \"id\": \"call_q0wg\",\n    \"function\": {\n      \"arguments\": \"{\\\"location\\\": \\\"New York, NY\\\",\\\"unit\\\": \\\"fahrenheit\\\"}\",\n      \"name\": \"get_current_weather\"\n    },\n    \"type\": \"function\"\n  }\n]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## [JSON Mode with Images](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#json-mode-with-images)\n\nThe &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct&#96; and &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct&#96; models support JSON mode! The following Python example queries the model with an image and text (i.e. \"Please pull out relevant information as a JSON object.\") with &#96;response_format&#96; set for JSON mode:\n\nPython\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfrom groq import Groq\nimport os\n\nclient = Groq(api_key=os.environ.get(\"GROQ_API_KEY\"))\n\ncompletion = client.chat.completions.create(\n    model=\"meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct\",\n    messages=[\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"List what you observe in this photo in JSON format.\"\n                },\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"image_url\",\n                    \"image_url\": {\n                        \"url\": \"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/da/SF_From_Marin_Highlands3.jpg\"\n                    }\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n    ],\n    temperature=1,\n    max_completion_tokens=1024,\n    top_p=1,\n    stream=False,\n    response_format={\"type\": \"json_object\"},\n    stop=None,\n)\n\nprint(completion.choices[0].message)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## [Multi-turn Conversations with Images](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#multiturn-conversations-with-images)\n\nThe &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct&#96; and &#96;meta-llama/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct&#96; models support multi-turn conversations! The following Python example shows a multi-turn user conversation about an image:\n\nPython\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfrom groq import Groq\nimport os\n\nclient = Groq(api_key=os.environ.get(\"GROQ_API_KEY\"))\n\ncompletion = client.chat.completions.create(\n    model=\"meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct\",\n    messages=[\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": [\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"text\",\n                    \"text\": \"What is in this image?\"\n                },\n                {\n                    \"type\": \"image_url\",\n                    \"image_url\": {\n                        \"url\": \"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/da/SF_From_Marin_Highlands3.jpg\"\n                    }\n                }\n            ]\n        },\n        {\n            \"role\": \"user\",\n            \"content\": \"Tell me more about the area.\"\n        }\n    ],\n    temperature=1,\n    max_completion_tokens=1024,\n    top_p=1,\n    stream=False,\n    stop=None,\n)\n\nprint(completion.choices[0].message)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## [Venture Deeper into Vision](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#venture-deeper-into-vision)\n\n### [Use Cases to Explore](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#use-cases-to-explore)\n\nVision models can be used in a wide range of applications. Here are some ideas:\n\n- Multi-turn Visual Conversations: Develop interactive applications that allow users to have extended conversations about images.\n- Multilingual Image Analysis: Create applications that can describe images in multiple languages.\n- E-commerce Product Description Generation: Create an application that generates product descriptions for e-commerce websites.\n- Accessibility Applications: Develop an application that generates audio descriptions for images by using a vision model to generate text descriptions for images, which can then be converted to audio with one of our audio endpoints.\n\nThese are just a few ideas to get you started. The possibilities are endless, and we're excited to see what you create with vision models powered by Groq for low latency and fast inference!\n\n### [Next Steps](https://console.groq.com/docs/vision#next-steps)\n\nCheck out our [Groq API Cookbook](https://github.com/groq/groq-api-cookbook) repository on GitHub (and give us a ⭐) for practical examples and tutorials:\n\n- [Multimodal Image Processing (Tool Use, JSON Mode)](https://github.com/groq/groq-api-cookbook/tree/main/tutorials/multimodal-image-processing)\n- [Image Moderation](https://github.com/groq/groq-api-cookbook/blob/main/tutorials/image%5Fmoderation.ipynb)\n\nWe're always looking for contributions. If you have any cool tutorials or guides to share, submit a pull request for review to help our open-source community!"
}
```

已完成修复，图片识别无响应的问题已按以下方式处理：

## 修改说明

### 1. 为布局图转换强制使用 Vision 模型

在 `backend/src/controllers/map.ts` 中增加 `VISION_MODEL_OVERRIDES` 映射，对常见 provider 在图片识别时强制使用支持视觉的模型：

| Provider | 使用的视觉模型 |
|----------|----------------|
| OpenAI   | gpt-4o |
| Groq     | meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct |
| 通义千问 | qwen-vl-max |
| 智谱     | glm-4v |

无论你在 AI 配置中选择的是 gpt-3.5-turbo、llama-3 等文本模型，在进行「选择布局图并转换」时，后端会自动切换到上述 Vision 模型，确保请求能被正确识别。

### 2. 改进错误提示

当模型或接口不支持图片时（如 DeepSeek 等未配置 Vision 的 provider），会返回更明确的提示：

> 当前 AI 配置的模型不支持图片识别，请选择支持视觉的配置（如 OpenAI 的 gpt-4o）

## 使用建议

1. **优先使用 OpenAI**：选一个使用 `gpt-4o` 的 OpenAI 配置，图片识别最稳定。
2. **图片大小**：Groq 对 Base64 图片限制为 4MB，建议控制布局图体积。
3. **未列出的 Provider（如 DeepSeek）**：若仍使用其默认文本模型，图片识别可能失败，建议改用上述任一支持 Vision 的配置。

重启后端服务后，再尝试「选择布局图并转换」功能即可验证效果。
